items.text:
Actors showreels - CHOOSE THE BEST! Be Just Productions lead the way in industry standard showreels for actors across the north of England including Liverpool,  Sheffield, Manchester and Leeds...and are coming to Carlisle. 

Our next drama scene is "The information" - a gritty style drama scene that will take place in Carlisle, Cumbria on the 4th - 5th July and we will be working in association with Lakeside Castings. (www.lakesidecastings.com)

Book one of our remaining spaces before they fill up for just £25 deposit. (Final balance must be cleared by TWO WEEKS before shoot day) and receive: 

🎬 Your bespoke scene script 
🎥 Cinematic film and audio quality final scene
💪 Guidance and collaboration with professional film makers to ensure your best performance 
💰 Cut price due to high demand to support and develop your career 

📅 4th-5th July
🌎 city centre location
💸 £125 (down from £225) - £25 deposit to secure your place

Email kris@bejustproductions.com or info@lakesidecastings.com and say hello 👋  
Instagram: bejust_productions

items.text:
Acting Workshop
In this workshop Jeremy introduces the concept SHOSHIN for ACTORS.

Monday 1st June - Book here: https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/shoshin-for-actors-tickets-1989902633343

This unique and intensive course looks to -

Advance your acting skills and enhance your ability to communicate more freely, authentically, and appropriately on stage and off. Prepare for and commit to auditions and casting with less nervous anxiety and greater authenticity and ease.
Let go of old habits and pre-conceptions that may be holding you back.

The full day is just £60.

Book here: https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/shoshin-for-actors-tickets-1989902633343

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon, "deinem Lieblingssender"

MOVIETIME KW 21/2026

STAR WAR FEELING UND INTERVIEW MIT EINER SCHAUSPIELIKONE 

Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu startet am 20. Mai 2026 in den Kinos. Das lang erwartete Science-Fiction-Abenteuer bringt das beliebte Duo erstmals vom Streamingdienst Disney+ auf die große Kinoleinwand. Es markiert die lang ersehnte Rückkehr von Star Wars in die Lichtspielhäuser.

Die Legende des Wüstenkindes (Originaltitel: L'Enfant Du Désert) ist ein französisches Kino-Abenteuer und Familiendrama von Regisseur Gilles de Maistre. Nun startet der Film und basiert auf historischen Nomaden-Überlieferungen aus Nordafrika.

Im letzten Sommer beendete er seine Schauspielkarriere, wir konnten mit der Ikone des deutschsprachigen Film, Sky Dumont, ein Interview über seine Laufbahn führen und Prof Mag Adolf Obendrauf erzählt uns was die Militärmusik NÖ mit dem Film verbindet.

Ergänzt wird das einstündige Magazin mit Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 20.5.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

Fotocredits: SMF, Disney Pictures

items.text:
Liebe Caster, liebe Booker, liebe Produktionsteams, 

wenn Ihr bei kurzfristigen Besetzungen kein Blut sehen könnt, dann könnt Ihr genau dafür mich buchen. 

Ich bin Christian Weiße aus Köln, Darsteller, Komparse, Kleindarsteller, Content Creator und Filmproduzent mit viel Praxis vor und hinter der Kamera. Ich kenne Setabläufe, verstehe Disposition, Regie, Timing, Anschluss, Geduld, Wiederholungen, kurzfristige Änderungen und die Realität am Drehtag. Genau deshalb bin ich nicht nur ein weiterer Name in einer Liste, sondern eine verlässliche Lösung, wenn eine Besetzung sauber, glaubwürdig und ohne zusätzliche Reibung funktionieren muss. 

Ich bin kurzfristig verfügbar, komme aus Köln und bin je nach Projekt auch überregional organisierbar. Auf Wunsch auch gemeinsam mit Sandra Wötzel als eingespielte Duo-Option: einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Darsteller gewinnen. 

Referenzen vor der Kamera, Kurzform: 

Film / Kino: Identitti, About us / Afterglow, DIE JAHRE MIT DIR, Embrace The Switch 

TV / Serien / Streaming: Alles was zählt, Unter Uns, Soko Köln, Die Landarztpraxis, Die Füchsin, Köln 50667, Frier & 50 - Am Ende meiner Tage, Die Falle, Plötzlich Schwester, The Comeback, Tatort - Maskerade, Tatort - Die guten Leute, Mein bester Freund, seine Freundin und ich, Wäldern - Staffel 3, Husk, Merz gegen Merz, So hell die Nacht, Die Zweiflers, Doitscha, Perfekt zusammen?!, Embassy, Der Blaulicht Report, Auf Streife, Notruf 

Show / Doku / Factual / Magazin: ZDF heute Show, RTL extra - Der Kaffeereport, Das Motzmobil, Ich bin ein Star - das Nachspiel, Local Hero Bingo, Terra Xplore - Thema Trennung, Die Pumuckl Show, Grill den Henssler 

Gericht / Scripted Reality: Barbara Salesch - Das Strafgericht, Ulrich Wetzel - Das Strafgericht 

Werbung / Web / Eigenproduktion: Edle Tropfen, über 1000 eigene Image-, Event-, Doku- und Filmproduktionen 

Meine Daten in Kurzform: 

Christian Weiße 
Spielalter: 35-50 
Wohnort: Köln 
Größe: 175 cm 
Gewicht: 75 kg 
Konfektion: 48 
Schuhgröße: 41 
Augen: blau-grün 
Haare: dunkelblond, kurz 
Brille: Brillenträger, ohne Brille spielbar 
Führerschein: B, BE, AM 
Kontakt: 017661015160 
E-Mail: christian.weisse.talent@gmail.com 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/christianweissedigicontent/ 

Wenn Ihr also eine Besetzung sucht, die sichtbar passt, seterfahren arbeitet, zuverlässig erscheint und am Drehtag eher entlastet als erklärt werden muss, dann denkt gern an mich. 

Ich bin bereit, Euer Projekt mit Professionalität, Timing und Herz zu unterstützen und stimme der Datenspeicherung zu. 

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion

items.text:
Ready to tackle Shakespeare?

Join us this summer for a series of intimate workshops, available both [in-person](https://partiful.com/e/wNz5NkbbhsudrdqkpV8G) and [online](https://partiful.com/e/e5ajloGMiYZFbKrdA9fT), perfect for anyone who has wanted to perform Shakespeare but is unsure of how to start.

**[In-Person: Sundays, June 7 - July 19 ✹ 2:00PM - 5:00PM](https://partiful.com/e/wNz5NkbbhsudrdqkpV8G)**
$200 Early Registration | $240 after June 1

**[Online: Tuesdays, June 2 - July 7 ✹ 6:00PM - 9:00PM](https://partiful.com/e/e5ajloGMiYZFbKrdA9fT)**
$200 Early Registration | $240 after May 28

✹ Limited to 6 spots ✹ Includes a 1:1 virtual coaching session for each participant

Working on a monologue is the ideal introduction to acting Shakespeare. In this workshop, we'll learn a variety of techniques and exercises to help you act Shakespeare's language truthfully and with confidence.

We'll learn about
• Shakespearean Script Analysis

• Iambic Pentameter and using the verse to inform action and emotion
• Using physicality to unlock the meaning of the language

• Discovering and developing character objectives and motivations
• Taking ownership of Shakespeare's words and performing with confidence

Register Here:

**[In-Person: Sundays, June 7 - July 19 ✹ 2:00PM - 5:00PM](https://partiful.com/e/wNz5NkbbhsudrdqkpV8G)**

https://partiful.com/e/wNz5NkbbhsudrdqkpV8G

**[Online: Tuesdays, June 2 - July 7 ✹ 6:00PM - 9:00PM](https://partiful.com/e/e5ajloGMiYZFbKrdA9fT)**

https://partiful.com/e/e5ajloGMiYZFbKrdA9fT

✹︎Payments plans and sliding scale available! ✹︎
Email [info@actingshakespeare.co](mailto:info@actingshakespeare.co) for details

About Your Instructor
Ryan Paul is an Austin-based actor, educator,and founder of [Acting Shakespeare](https://www.actingshakespeare.co/) – a space to help actors of all levels perform Shakespeare's works with confidence.

items.text:
Hey everyone! My name is Mateus Matos, and I’m an actor based in the Charleston, SC area currently getting more involved in the Southeast indie film scene. I recently participated in a table read in Wilmington and have also been auditioning for a few indie film projects while continuing to build experience on camera.  

I’m currently looking for opportunities in short films, indie films, horror projects, student films, commercials, and background work.  

My training includes NYFA Bootcamp in New York, NYDA, Hanover Theatre acting/audition training, improv work, and script breakdown coaching. I’ve been focusing heavily on scene work, emotional realism, self tapes, and continuing to grow as an actor through both training and real project experience. I’m fluent in English, Portuguese, and Spanish.  

I’m very open to traveling throughout the Southeast for projects and would love to connect with more filmmakers, casting directors, and creatives in the area. Happy to send headshots, self tapes, or additional materials if needed. Looking forward to connecting!

💛 A live performance that feels unexpectedly captivating.

sharedPost.text:
💫To be able to leap into the air, seem to float there, and then land without a sound—that is the pinnacle of artistry.
⚡️ See that energy ignite onstage. Don’t miss the magic of a live performance.
🎟️ Choose your best seats here 👉 https://1kb.link/qJDkdm
💫 Allow yourself to feel something unforgettable.
💛 You deserve all the good things.

items.text:
# **Looking for driven creators & creative entrepreneurs to join our roster.**

I'm a **Community Impact Producer** 
I connect community-driven businesses and social enterprises (brands with real missions, not just profit goals) to talented creators who can tell their stories.

**What I'm building:** A team of collaborators who create branded content and short films that showcase what we do best. This content becomes our leverage to land paid opportunities with businesses and brands who value our style, impact, and community connection. #COLLECTIVEEFFORT

**What I need from you:**
* Self-driven and passionate about your craft
* Ready to create NOW (no excuses, no delays)
* Interested in building a real career in the creative space
* Comfortable with an intensive, productive work pace

**What this isn't:**
* A casual hobby project
* A "maybe someday" opportunity

**If you're interested, speak up and be ready to go.** This is for people who want to build something real.

Comment your FOCUS and GOALS if interested.

items.title: # **Looking for driven creators & creative entrepreneurs to join our roster.**

items.text:
Hi my name is Sofiia 
I'm 15 years old and based in los angeles Interested in fashion modeling,clothing brands,lifestyle shoots and creative collaboration Instagram:dance_sofi44 #lamodelsyouth #teenmodel #lifestyle #fashionmodeling

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, braids and blonde hair
May be an image of one or more people, blonde hair and people smiling

topComments.text:
You should have your parent monitor anything you are posting in groups like this. These people aren't vetted. In LA to work with a minor they must have a CPS permit. 

If you are serious about this kind of work you need training and an agent. An agent or manager will act as a buffer to keep you safe in an industry that isn't safe.

Please do not meet or talk to strangers. It's already a red flag if they are talking to you without an adult.

I'm a youth performer advocate and the parent of a teen actor. 

The safest way to get into this work is to do some classes and get representation.
Girl close your shirt, you are only to attract pedos on here who will take advantage of you. Get your parents to find you an agent and stop posting in fb groups.

items.text:
Dzień dobry! Casting do 21 sezonu serialu Gliniarze w Warszawie! 
8 ról, fajne stawki!!!! Można się zgłaszać do więcej niż jednej roli, jeśli się pasuje 🙂 Więcej informacji o tym, jak się zgłosić, gdzie i do kogo, na samym dole.

1. Wojtek Bomba (27) – kurier, przeciętna sylwetka, miła i przyjazna aparycja (1,2 + PPS2, PPS6) KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 04.06

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

2. Błażej (17) – zbuntowany nastolatek, agresywny, członek gangu nielatów. Brunet, styl roadman.  (1,2,10-OFF,13+ PPS2, PPS3) 

Terminy: 2 dnie zdjęciowe 04.06 i 05.06

Stawka: 800zł na rękę 

3. Sebastian (17) – zbuntowany nastolatek, agresywny, członek gangu nielatów. Blondyn, styl roadman. (1,2,9,10,13+ PPS2, PPS4) 

Terminy: 2 dnie zdjęciowe 04.06 i 05.06

Stawka: 800zł na rękę 

4. Maciek (16) – zbuntowany nastolatek, agresywny, członek gangu. Szatyn, styl roadman. (1,2,12+ PPS2, PPS5)

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 04.06 i 05.06

Stawka: 800zł na rękę 

5. Jolanta (44) – pracownica osiedlowego sklepu, miła kobieta, przeciętna sylwetka i aparycja, codzienny ubiór (5,6,8) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 04.06

Stawka: 500zł na rękę 

6. Morwa (32)–  ratownik medyczny kradnący leki, cwaniacka aparycja, wysportowany, długie włosy, zarost (17,18,19,20,21) KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 05.06 i 06.06

Stawka: 1200zł na rękę 

7. Arkadiusz Oboźny (41) – przeciętny mężczyzna, przystojny, ale zaniedbany i zmęczony życiem. Uzależniony od morfiny. (24 + PPS6, PPS7)

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 04.06

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

8. Właścicielka (37) – ładna, zadbana, ale wymęczona właścicielka typowo damskiego butiku (16A) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 05.06

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

—————————————————

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres e-mail:

natan.gliniarze@gmail.com

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci - można kilka, jeśli pasuje się do więcej niż jednej!!!!!

WAŻNE !!!

W treści maila proszę umieścić:
* linki do swoich materiałów video na YouTube
* aktualne zdjęcie
* wiek, wzrost, wagę
* informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu 
* oraz nr telefonu do kontaktu

Jeżeli ktoś nie ma żadnych materiałów, to proszę o informację w mailu. Podeślę wybranym osobom scenkę do nagrania.

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
Urgent casting London
Short Film: Suzi

A paid short film looking for a Turkish actress to cover a drop off.

* Female

* Playing age: **45–55**

* **Turkish / Kurdish**

* Must speak **Turkish fluently**

* Warm, emotionally complex, naturalistic performer

* Strong subtle acting and emotional subtext preferred

 SHOOT DETAILS

* **Location:** London

* **Shoot Dates:** 22–23 May

* **Rate:** £200/day

* **Rehearsal:** Required prior to shoot

* **Urgent fast-turnaround casting** due to actor drop-off

A quiet, intimate drama focused on identity, memory, family, and belonging.

### TO APPLY

Please send:

* Headshot / recent photos

* CV or Spotlight link (if available)

Email: **[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)**

**Please confirm in your application that:**

* You speak Turkish

* You are available on 22–23 May

* You are London-based or able to travel to London

You can also add:

> Subject Line: “SUZI – [Your Name]”

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of ‎text that says '‎Suzi Aged Aged45-55 45 - 45-55 55 Turkish/Kurdish Turkish Kurdish م (SUZ (SUZAN) SUZI ROLE UZAN BREAKDOWN KEMAL' KEMAL'SAUNTY. WARM BUT COMPLEX-HE COMPLEX-HERSTORIES HER STORIES MOVE BETWEEN HUMOURAND AND PAIN. EMOTION SITS CLOSE TO THE SURFACE, OFTEN SPILLING OUT UNEXPECTEDLY. LOOKING FORANATURAL, FORA INSTINCTIVEPERFORMER. INSTINCTIVE PERFORMER. Mora‎'‎

May be a graphic of text that says 'TITLE: LE:MIRAS LOGLINE: In his father's funeral, Kemal, young 2nd generation immigrant, begins the painful process of uncovering his Family' S turbulent past when a dialogue with his aunty forces him to confront the legacy they left behind. A quiet, intimate story about identity and belongin within the Alevi diaspora. Location: London Dates: 2 days Late May Paid Think restrained performances, emotional subtext, and naturalism. ለረ I'

items.text:
😳
Mark Jermin, Agent To 'Harry Potter' Actors, Admits Self-Tape Mistakes https://share.google/Llr2MraMsb2nSlkFp

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'TIP US DEADLINE LLAVE YOUR ALOOIS HM LOOP 800+ SPEAMERS 200+ GARTISTS 100+ ALL IN ALLINREALLIFE REAL LIFE LOOP JOR u SXSWK SXSWILONDON SHAPE SEPITURE PERSON Mark Jermin HOME Getty/Mark Mark Jermin TikTok AGENCIES INTERNATIONAL Mark Jermin, TikTok-Famous Talent Agent To 'Harry Potter' Actors, Mishandled Self- Self-Tape Tape Auditions & Misstated His Casting Power'

topComments.text: It’s not a surprise and well done for the student speaking out. This industry is hard enough and a lot of people fear causing issues by saying something. I’m sure a lot of CD’s will start to loose confidence in this agency now.

I encountered MJ and team at an event in London. There were other child actor agencies there too. Undoubtedly MJ has had huge successes over the years but found it very interesting that the way his company approached things was very different to what the other agencies were saying, The others seemed much more mindful of young actor’s mental health and managing expectations etc. The other agencies said it was important not to get caught up with what other young actors are doing and what is put out on social media.

items.text:
Hi everyone!
I just thought I'd introduce myself. My name is Marek Olszewski and I'm an independent filmmaker based here in London.

 I have just moved here from Galway, Ireland where I completed by Level 8 BA Hons in Film & Documentary at Atlantic Technological University Galway.

 I have made already third short films, I do social media but I have moved here to get started in the British Film Industry.

 Ideally, I would like to work on set as a runner but I would also like to do a bit of acting.

Thank you!

Marek

The Bay - Casting
Does anyone know who will be doing casting for the upcoming series of The Bay?  Done it previously with Mad Dog (who are no more), and I believe Norf Casting did it but I'm not sure if they are still operating as I stopped getting notifications and get no replies to emails.  Thanks in advance.

topComments.text: Kelly Valentine Hendry’s casting for Season 6
Mad dog no more ? Probably a good thing considering how discriminative they are as they only seem to want people with beards and tattoos

Stawka 120 zł. płatne gotówką po planie 
Gramy klientów galerii handlowej 
Lokalizacja WAWER
Plan od godzin porannych

Na plan serialu współczesnego szukamy statystów w różnym wieku jako klientów sklepu 

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o zgłoszenia z aktualnym zdjęciem I nr telefonu na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

Dopisek w tytule GALERIA

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie nadesłanych zdjęć 

Zapraszamy tylko osoby, które bez problemu same dojadą na plan

Szukamy Toyoty Yaris I gen. w złotym kolorze na plan filmowy w Warszawie lub okolicach.
📍Lokalizacja: Warszawa / okolice
📍Termin: 17.05
📍Wynagrodzenie: 250 zł za dzień zdjęciowy
Auto będzie wykorzystywane jako tło/scenografia do zdjęć.

💌Jeśli masz takie auto lub znasz kogoś, kto ma - proszę o wiadomość prywatną ze zdjęciem samochodu na adres mailowy: ludzie@unagimedia.pl

items.text: Zapraszam do zgłoszeń🎭 będzie się działo!!!🥳

sharedPost.text:
📣 Przypominamy — trwa nabór do rezydencji!🎭
Jeśli pracujesz w teatrze, performansie, dramaturgii albo na styku różnych sztuk, zapraszamy Cię do udziału w rezydencjach „Imersja. Przestrzeń kameralna” 
Szukamy dwuosobowych zespołów twórczych 👥

Oferujemy:
 🏛️ przestrzeń do pracy
 🏠 zakwaterowanie
 🤝 współpracę z krakowskimi artystami
 📚 opiekę merytoryczną
 💰 stypendium 1500 zł / osoba
 🎬 wsparcie realizacji pokazów rezydencyjnych 

Jeden z projektów zostanie wybrany do realizacji jako pełnowymiarowy spektakl w kolejnym roku ✨
Masz pomysł, który jeszcze nie chce być spektaklem, ale już domaga się ciała, głosu, przestrzeni i czasu?
To zaproszenie do pracy nad koncepcją teatralną w warunkach, które pozwalają szukać, sprawdzać, błądzić, rozmawiać i odkrywać 🔍 Nie trzeba przychodzić z gotowym spektaklem. Wystarczy potrzeba opowiedzenia „czegoś” poprzez przestrzeń — małą, intensywną, żywą 🌌

📄 Regulamin i szczegóły:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1BWzZo1VdTGrO9jGi7NTRF0omS-BKK1o8/view?usp=sharing
📝 Formularz zgłoszeniowy:
 https://forms.gle/rKJ3DFNRzoMLCEpP9  

📅 Zgłoszenia do 31.05.2026

Wejdź w przestrzeń. Sprawdź, co może się w niej wydarzyć.🪐🌀

items.text:
SEEKING HMUA PAID
Looking for a HMUA to assist on a Non-Union feature film on Monday, May 18th and Tuesday may 19th. Looking for someone who can help with light glam on female talent and touch ups on background actors! This is a Paid position! 

Location: Pittsburg, PA 

Dates: May 18th-19th 

Rate: $250/12hrs

To apply, email me: sarah.turnermua@gmail.com

Even if you’re not Available for both days, please email me specifying which day you are available if interested! You will also likely not be needed the entire 12 hours but will still be paid the full amount regardless. KIT NOT PROVIDED, BRING YOUR OWN SUPPLIES! Food/crafty will be provided on set and you will receive on screen credit!

items.text:
Looking for A2/Sound Engineer for ‘Next to Normal’ (CHI)
My company Scene Five Productions is in search of an A2/Sound Engineer for our upcoming production of Next to Normal.

We are looking for a candidate who is comfortable live-mixing our actors mics. 

Our production runs over two weekends, at the Bramble Arts Loft: July 24th-26th and July 31-August 2nd. Additionally, our tech days are July 20th-23rd.

This position will have a stipend of $500.

If interested, please email scenefiveproductions@gmail.com with your resume!

items.text:
🎥 TWO-MINUTE TUESDAY 🎥  
   🎬 Talent Drop Tuesday  🎬

You met the stars. Now meet the TALENT.  

Post a 2-minute-or-less clip:  
- Monologue you love  
- Song snippet  
- Self-tape you’re proud of  
- Hidden skill: accents, instruments, stunts, puppetry — word is casted too
- Even a BTS from class/rehearsal  
-a video do your talent
- No video? Drop your best action shot + tell us the story behind it.

It doesn’t have to be perfect. It has to be YOU.  

RULES: 
No apologies. No “this is bad but…” Energy only.  
Just post it in the comments and go for it. Casting directors scroll. Let’s give them something to stop for.

sharedPost.text:
✨ CASTING CALL ✨
📍 Colorado Springs, Denver & surrounding areas

Due to an overwhelming increase in bookings — including frequent double and triple bookings — Once Upon A Dream is currently looking to expand our dream team of professional character performers!

As our cast continues to grow, we are actively working toward expanding authentic and diverse representation within these roles and are especially seeking performers of color for our Huntrix casting needs. Performers of Asian descent especially are strongly encouraged to apply!

Roles Needed: Rumi, Mira, Zoey, and all Saja boys.

What We’re Looking For:

✨ Comfortable performing in character and interacting with kids
✨ Great with children (experience with special needs children is a HUGE bonus!)
✨Acting skills (singing is a plus, but not required)
✨Flexible weekend availability
✨Reliable, enthusiastic, and passionate about creating magical memories

No professional training required — just heart, commitment, and a love for bringing stories to life. Training and costumes will be provided. 

💌 Interested in joining the magic?

• DM us via any of our social media platforms
• Text (719) 246-7591, or
• Email onceuponadream.co@outlook.com 

#coloradosprings #performers #theaterlife #characterperformers #castingcall

Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

items.text:
Hey guys!! Happy Summer!!! Classes are now open for June! We teach the business part other classes leave out - how to get repped once you're ready for rep, how to make sure your headshots are working for you, how to expand rep into other markets, etc -- all while doing a deep dive into TV, film, and commercial. We also offer incredible, informative VO classes for actors wanting to get into voice work!  Would love to have you with us for June! Teachers have all been working in the business for 10+ years professionally. Come learn from Film/Commercial Casting Directors, NYC/LA agents, and VO casting professionals!

To learn more about the classes we offer, please visit: www.sarahdowlingcasting.com/actors

To register or ask any questions, please email us at: SarahDowlingCasting@gmail.com

Thanks!

🎬 CASTING CALL – OTHER MANS LIFE🎬

Seeking actors for our upcoming dramatic short film: THE OTHER MAN’S LIFE

A grounded psychological drama about two men from opposite worlds who trade lives for 24 hours, only to realize the life they wanted comes with consequences they never saw coming.

(UNPAID STUDENT SHORT‼️ trying to get the name out) 

Location: Raleigh/Durham area
 
Shoot date: June 11-13

EMAIL: eandmcinematic@gmail.com

ROLES:

• JACK (Lead) – Male, 35–45
Successful, wealthy, emotionally hollow. Corporate, sharp, controlled, carrying deep loneliness.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

Ethan takes a deep breath. One. JACK (COT 'D) Two. JACK (CONT D) JACK Three. (CONT D) They inject. The world bends, blurry. They both fall back. Everything fades sound fades and eyes become to black. c TO:'

May be an image of text that says 'EXT. ROOFTOP PARKING GARAGE- NIGHT City lights. Wind. Jack waits. Ethan steps out of the shadows. You don't ETHAN even know me. Jack gives the faintest smile. smi JACK I know the look. Jack opens his trunk. case. Ritualistic. A sleek briefcase, Inside: not your average -Two syringes, a vial of clear liquid, and a plastic cup.'

items.text:
Seeking actor for the role of BOB in the short film All American Dinner.
BOB
White male, mid-50s to early 70s. 
A longtime husband who has grown distant and emotionally inattentive in his marriage. Set in his ways, distracted, and unaware of the emotional disconnect around him. Dry realism and subtle emotional depth are important for the role.

Filming: September
Location: Los Angeles
Compensation: Paid, credit, meals 

Non union 

To submit, please send:
• Headshot
• Resume/Reel (if available)
• Contact Information

Email: allamericandinner@gmail.com.    
Subject Line: “BOB Submission – All American Dinner

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM UNKNOWN TO BOOKING A LEAD ROLE ON A NETFLIX SHOW AT 18
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and the LEAD in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started out when I was 14 and went from having no connections to signing with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood at 17, moving to LA, and booking a series regular on a Netflix show within three months.

Some people call that luck, but what they don’t see is the years of hard work and the clear strategy behind every move I made to move forward. 

Lately, I have been connecting with so many of you, and one thing keeps coming up again and again:

ACTORS WHO ARE FEELING STUCK AND DON’T KNOW WHAT TO DO TO CHANGE IT

You train.
You get your materials together.
You are told “get an agent.”

But then…
You get an agent and nothing happens
Or you do not have one yet and don’t know how to get in the room

And if nothing changes, how will your career look two year from now?

That frustration is exactly why I created this.

A 2 hour, 1 to 1 personalised career mentorship session over Zoom.

We cover:
• The one skill an actor must have to book work, and how to assess if you truly have it (hint: it’s not talent) 
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t have an agent, and how to actively work toward getting one
• What to do if your agent isn’t sending you auditions 
• What to do if you’re auditioning a lot but not booking (the key most actors miss)
• The materials you actually need, and what most actors get wrong
• How to expand opportunities for yourself
• Plus much more

YOU LEAVE WITH AN EXACT PLAN TO BRIDGE THE GAP BETWEEN WHERE YOU ARE NOW AND WHERE YOU WANT TO GET TO, PLUS THE EXACT STRATEGY I USED TO GO FROM UNKNOWN TO WORKING ACTOR.

If you’re ready to commit, comment COMMIT below or send me a DM 🤗

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of one or more people

topComments.text: The problems we have is we live in a small seaside town. And casting want people who live within and hour of filming. That’s never going to be an option for us. Even though we are willing to travel.

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL
For the forthcoming stage play

OPEN AUDTIONS TO BE HELD AT THE ARTS BAR HOPE STREET ON THE 27TH OF MAY 12-2PM

BREXITUS NEXITUS

A dark comedy set in Roman times with strikingly modern themes

Brexitus Nexitus takes a light-hearted yet biting look at whether Britain has really changed since the Roman occupation.

Spoiler alert: it hasn’t.

ROLES AVAILABLE

SEEKING MALE/FEMALE PERFORMERS 18 AND ABOVE 

FLOTUS

A bored, frustrated psychopathic wife of Governor Potus 

AGRIPPA

A dim but ambitious Roman general

MAXIMUS 

A scheming civil servant and the secret head of Intelligence.

HONORIOUS 

A shipwrecked missionary destined to become King Arthur.

PERFORMANCE DETAILS

📍 Hope Street Theatre, Liverpool

📅 2nd, 3rd & 4th July 2026

IMPORTANT INFORMATION

This is a profit-share production

Applicants must be local to Liverpool

Only suitable applicants will be contacted

HOW TO APPLY THIS IS AN OPEN CASTING CALL SO PLEASE JUST TURN UP

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
🎬 FILM FABULARNY – BIELSKO-BIAŁA I OKOLICE 🎬
Na zdjęcia realizowane w dniach 26/27/28.05.2026 poszukujemy statystów i epizodystów do produkcji filmowej.

📍 Lokalizacja: Bielsko-Biała i okolice

🔸 DUBLERKA ZNANEJ AKTORKIPoszukujemy kobiety zgodnej z opisem:• ciemne, długie włosy• wzrost 170–175 cm• rozmiar ubrań 36–38

📅 Dostępność: 26–28.05 (3 dni zdjęciowe)

💰 Stawka: 200 zł za każdy dzień zdjęciowy

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „DUBLERKA”

——————————————

📅 26.05 (1 dzień zdjęciowy)

🏄‍♂️ MŁODY SURFER• wysportowany mężczyzna w wieku 25–45 lat

epizod niemy – granie nieboszczyka

💰 180 zł płatne gotówką po planie

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „SURFER”

——————————————

🏄 SUPSzukamy osób potrafiących pływać na SUP-ie.

💰 300 zł gotówką po planie – z własnym sprzętem

💰 250 zł gotówką po planie – bez własnego sprzętu

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „SUP”W treści maila napisz, czy posiadasz własną deskę z wiosłem.

——————————————

🎭 STATYŚCI

Szukamy osób w każdym wieku jako:

• policjanci i policjantki

• ratownicy medyczni

• przechodnie

• młodzież szkolna

• licealiści

💰 110 zł płatne gotówką po planie

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „GM26”

——————————————

📅 27.05 (1 dzień zdjęciowy)

🛹 DZIECI JEŻDŻĄCE NA DESKOROLKACH (6–16 lat)• epizod niemy

💰 200 zł – z własnymi deskorolkami

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „DESKOROLKA”

——————————————

🎭 STATYŚCI

Szukamy osób w każdym wieku jako:

• policjanci

• pielęgniarki i pielęgniarze

• osoby grające w szachy

• przechodnie

• dzieci bawiące się na placu zabaw

💰 110 zł płatne gotówką po planie

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „GM27”

——————————————

📩 Zgłoszenia przez formularz:https://forms.gle/abFGHnRs64zp2PT78

lub mailowo 📧 ludzie@unagimedia.pl

W treści zgłoszenia zawrzyj:

• imię i nazwisko

• wiek

• wzrost

• numer telefonu

• zdjęcie twarzy oraz sylwetk

i• rozmiar ubrań (dotyczy roli „DUBLERKA”)

❗ Pamiętaj o zatytułowaniu maila nazwą roli.

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎬

items.text:
🎥 SZUKAMY DOKUMENTALISTKI / DOKUMENTALISTY!
Masz łatwość nawiązywania kontaktów? Lubisz poznawać ludzi i odkrywać historie, które zasługują na pokazanie światu? A może potrafisz znaleźć niezwykłych bohaterów tam, gdzie inni widzą zwyczajną codzienność?

 

Do zespołu realizującego serial dokumentalny „Żony Podlasia” szukamy osoby do pracy w terenie, która pomoże nam odnaleźć bohaterki programu i dotrzeć do inspirujących historii z Podlasia.

 

🌾 Co będziesz robić?

✔️ wyszukiwać bohaterki do serialu,

✔️ rozmawiać z mieszkańcami regionu,

✔️ budować relacje i zdobywać zaufanie,

✔️ odkrywać niepowtarzalne historie,

✔️ współpracować z redakcją i ekipą produkcyjną,

✔️ nagrywać wizytówki z potencjalnymi bohaterkami,

 

🌿 Kogo szukamy?

✔️ osoby otwartej, komunikatywnej i samodzielnej,

✔️ ciekawej ludzi i świata,

✔️ gotowej do pracy w terenie,

✔️ z wyczuciem do rozmowy i słuchania,

✔️ osoby mającej umiejętności nagrywania krótkich formatów,

✔️ posiadającej prawo jazdy kat. B,

 

✨ Oferujemy:

• pracę od zaraz,

• udział w wyjątkowym projekcie telewizyjnym,

• pracę w malowniczych zakątkach Podlasia,

• możliwość poznania niezwykłych ludzi i ich historii,

• współpracę z profesjonalną ekipą produkcyjną.

 

Jeśli czujesz, że to praca dla Ciebie – odezwij się do nas!

Warunki wynagrodzenia i zatrudnienia w wiadomości prywatnej.

Skontaktujemy się z tylko z wybranymi kandydatami.

 

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać w wiadomości prywatnej lub na adres: kstokowska@grupazpr.pl

🎥 SZUKAMY DOKUMENTALISTKI / DOKUMENTALISTY!
Masz łatwość nawiązywania kontaktów? Lubisz poznawać ludzi i odkrywać historie, które zasługują na pokazanie światu? A może potrafisz znaleźć niezwykłych bohaterów tam, gdzie inni widzą zwyczajną codzienność?

 

Do zespołu realizującego serial dokumentalny „Żony Podlasia” szukamy osoby do pracy w terenie, która pomoże nam odnaleźć bohaterki programu i dotrzeć do inspirujących historii z Podlasia.

 

🌾 Co będziesz robić?

✔️ wyszukiwać bohaterki do serialu,

✔️ rozmawiać z mieszkańcami regionu,

✔️ budować relacje i zdobywać zaufanie,

✔️ odkrywać niepowtarzalne historie,

✔️ współpracować z redakcją i ekipą produkcyjną,

✔️ nagrywać wizytówki z potencjalnymi bohaterkami,

 

🌿 Kogo szukamy?

✔️ osoby otwartej, komunikatywnej i samodzielnej,

✔️ ciekawej ludzi i świata,

✔️ gotowej do pracy w terenie,

✔️ z wyczuciem do rozmowy i słuchania,

✔️ osoby mającej umiejętności nagrywania krótkich formatów,

✔️ posiadającej prawo jazdy kat. B,

 

✨ Oferujemy:

• pracę od zaraz,

• udział w wyjątkowym projekcie telewizyjnym,

• pracę w malowniczych zakątkach Podlasia,

• możliwość poznania niezwykłych ludzi i ich historii,

• współpracę z profesjonalną ekipą produkcyjną.

 

Jeśli czujesz, że to praca dla Ciebie – odezwij się do nas!

Warunki wynagrodzenia i zatrudnienia w wiadomości prywatnej.

Skontaktujemy się z tylko z wybranymi kandydatami.

 

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać w wiadomości prywatnej lub na adres: kstokowska@grupazpr.pl
items.title: 🎥 SZUKAMY DOKUMENTALISTKI / DOKUMENTALISTY!

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**film fabularny – GŁÓWNA ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **DZIEWCZYNKI 9-11 lat uprawiającej piłkę nożną / sporty walki / jazdę na motocrossie. **

Poszukuję dziewczynki odważnej, pyskatej, ale też wrażliwej. Bohaterka jest sprytna, pomysłowa, zabawna, co obserwujemy od pierwszych scen filmu. Jest odważna, ale bywa też niebezpieczna.

Zdjęcia: wrzesień-październik 2026 (uwaga - część zdjęć we Francji)

**Casting stacjonarny w Warszawie w niedzielę 24 maja.**

**Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do piątku 22 maja do końca dnia.**

Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć wizytówkę jako link do You Tube oraz doświadczenie przed kamerą i informację, który z wymienionych sportów uprawia.

*Proszę nie podawać doświadczenia w reklamach ani statystowania.*

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **WS**

W treści: imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost + informacja o doświadczeniu przed kamerą

W załączniku: aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

🎬 SZUKAMY STATYSTÓW (+16-99) DO TELEDYSKU — KRAKÓW, 25 MAJA

TY. Tak, dokładnie Ty.

Nie ma żadnych wymagań. Przyjdź, jak chcesz, w czym chcesz — w garniturze, dresie, kostiumie, cokolwiek. Twoja jedyna rola? Stać w kolejce. Serio, to wszystko.

Każdy jest tu idealny. Szukamy ludzi, nie typów — Polacy, obcokrajowcy, wszyscy mile widziani.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📍 Kraków

📅 25 maja (poniedziałek)

⏱ 1–3 godziny Twojego czasu

💵 40 zł gotówką na miejscu

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Chętny/a? Więcej szczegółów w wiadomości prywatnej.

Udostępnij dalej 🔁 — może ktoś z Twoich znajomych właśnie tego szuka.

Castingly - Spotlight
Hi Everyone! 

Daniel from Castingly here, I’m putting together a series of spotlight features for our social channels and would love to showcase you!

If you want to be considered: 

Send me your Castingly public profile page — must be live to qualify. 

Email me the profile link at daniel@castingly.com with SUBJECT: Spotlight — I'll need your bio and a short filmed monologue you'd want showcased. 

If you don’t have a profile but would like to join, use this special offer: Get one year FREE with code ACTOR-2026. Sign up at [www.castingly.com](https://www.castingly.com/) — no payment required.

Update on Castingly: We just hit ~2,000 members and have nationwide casting breakdowns LIVE. Casting directors and production companies are already signing up.

Follow for tips & updates: Instagram @castinglyHQ and Facebook @CastinglyFeel free to reach out with any questions! Reply here or DM me — happy to help you set up your profile fast.

**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn ‘’Leon’’ **

 

‘’Szukamy skarbu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!’’

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje mężczyzy w wieku 45 – 50 lat o obwodzie w klatce 100/105 cm, pas 95 - 105 ) do roli wuja głównej bohaterki. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia  realizujemy w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 2 3 tygodniowym. Postać występuję w 3 odcinkach z dialogami.

 

Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

sharedPost.text:
📣 Przypominamy — trwa nabór do rezydencji!🎭
Jeśli pracujesz w teatrze, performansie, dramaturgii albo na styku różnych sztuk, zapraszamy Cię do udziału w rezydencjach „Imersja. Przestrzeń kameralna” 
Szukamy dwuosobowych zespołów twórczych 👥

Oferujemy:
 🏛️ przestrzeń do pracy
 🏠 zakwaterowanie
 🤝 współpracę z krakowskimi artystami
 📚 opiekę merytoryczną
 💰 stypendium 1500 zł / osoba
 🎬 wsparcie realizacji pokazów rezydencyjnych 

Jeden z projektów zostanie wybrany do realizacji jako pełnowymiarowy spektakl w kolejnym roku ✨
Masz pomysł, który jeszcze nie chce być spektaklem, ale już domaga się ciała, głosu, przestrzeni i czasu?
To zaproszenie do pracy nad koncepcją teatralną w warunkach, które pozwalają szukać, sprawdzać, błądzić, rozmawiać i odkrywać 🔍 Nie trzeba przychodzić z gotowym spektaklem. Wystarczy potrzeba opowiedzenia „czegoś” poprzez przestrzeń — małą, intensywną, żywą 🌌

📄 Regulamin i szczegóły:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1BWzZo1VdTGrO9jGi7NTRF0omS-BKK1o8/view?usp=sharing
📝 Formularz zgłoszeniowy:
 https://forms.gle/rKJ3DFNRzoMLCEpP9  

📅 Zgłoszenia do 31.05.2026

Wejdź w przestrzeń. Sprawdź, co może się w niej wydarzyć.🪐🌀

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Principal Roles – 1 Female, 2 Males
*Short Film* 
# **"The Follower" **

Written & Directed by Lucas Cunningham, Produced by Ellie Griffin

Logline: *A struggling country singer joins a platform that gives her subscribers real-time access to her location. On a mountain getaway with her boyfriend, one of them shows up — and she finds they have more in common than she thought.*

Casting the following Roles:

**ALY REARDAN **Lead / Age 22-29 / Woman / PAID

*A struggling country singer from a lower-middle-class family. Wry sense of humor and an old-school work ethic. Tough and scrappy, she knows she’s got the talent, but she’s not sure how many more setbacks she can take. At least one. She loves her boyfriend, Colby, but he just doesn’t get it. Sometimes it feels like no one does.*

SKILLS: Sings. Preferred: guitar, stage combat experience

NUDITY**/**INTIMACY: Two scenes partially clothed in bed, moderate kissing & embrace Intimacy Director will be present.

**STEPHEN**** **Lead / Age 20-29 / Man / PAID

*An awkward mountain kid who’s been working in the same gas station since he was fifteen. A sensitive soul in a harsh world. He’s charming when he makes an effort, but he’s scared off every real friend he’s ever had. Spends too much time in the woods, on YouTube, and Thinking About Things.*

SKILLS: Preferred: sings, stage combat experience

NUDITY/INTIMACY: Two scenes partially clothed in bed, Intimacy Director will be present.

**COLBY**** **Lead /Age 23-33 / Man / PAID

*A rich kid with a heart of gold and a 401k. Nothing’s ever been that hard for him, but he turned out pretty good anyway. He loves making things easier for the people around him, and he can’t understand why his girlfriend Aly won’t let him help her. In turns bold, jealous, and considerate, he’s the model modern boyfriend – or at least close enough.*

SKILLS: Driving

NUDITY/INTIMACY: Moderate kissing & embrace, One scene partially clothed in bed, Intimacy Director will be present.

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

# **Auditions will be held in person on the ****Evening of May 26th**** **
# ***Video Auditions will also be accepted***

**Audition Materials:**** **Headshot, Resume, Supplemental video (optional). Sides will be provided. 1 minute of a country song if auditioning for Aly/Stephen**. ***Script available upon request.*

**Shoot Dates & Location****: **End of June. Boulder (& surrounding mountains), Colorado 

**Interested? Please email Ellie Griffin, Producer, **ellietgriffin@gmail.com** with headshot, resume, audition preference**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

Producer: Ellie Griffin 

Director: Lucas Cunningham 

Production Type: Indie 

Contact information: ellietgriffin@gmail.com

Compensation: Paid

Union Status: Non-Union 

Audition Information: Video OR In-Person May 26th

Shooting Schedule: End of June

Filming Location: Boulder & Surrounding Mountains, Colorado

**Interested? Please email Ellie Griffin, Producer, **ellietgriffin@gmail.com** with headshot, resume, audition preference**

items.title: CASTING CALL – Principal Roles – 1 Female, 2 Males

items.text:
**COLORADO SHORT FILM CASTING CALL!**

Shooting dates: 6-8 days in late July to early and mid-August. Weekends.

Location: Colorado front range, near Denver – specifics TBD

Genre: Drama, Coming of Age, Revolutionary War Era

A gentler masculinity is explored as young siblings play while the American revolutionary war whirls around them. 

Length: 12-14 minutes

Compensation: Paid project with meals, gas compensation, film festival recognition, IMDb credits, and high-quality demo reel footage provided.

Union or non-union. Looking for Colorado local actors!

*LEAD ROLES:*

**PAUL** 8-12 - Male, any race/ethnicity

The energetic, theatrical, youngest sibling who thinks he’s in charge. When his family was moved out into rural Pennsylvania by his father, he was distraught to find how quiet it was, much different from the New York carnivals and theatre shows he had grown up admiring. Quiet moments therefore must be filled by imaginative games. 

**MARGARET** 10-13 - Female, caucasian

The protective older sibling. Cool and calculating, hiding a deep rage inside. She’s searching for a reason for that rage to be justified -- and the war gives it to her. 

**CAPTAIN PAUL** early 20’s - Male, any race/ethnicity

The older version of Paul. deadly serious and reckless, he wants to join the local militia to fight the oppression of the monarchy. 

*SUPPORTING ROLES:*

**BENEDICT** 8-12 - Male, any race/ethnicity

Quiet, reserved, the drummer boy in the local militia.

**GENERAL BENEDICT** early 20’s - Male, any race/ethnicity

Confident, commanding, a bit of a tortured soul. 

**BERRY **40s-60s - Male, any race/ethnicity

A disheartened leader in the local militia. 

**FATHER **30-60, male, any race/ethnicity. Quaker farmer.

**MOTHER** 30-50, female, any race/ethnicity. Quaker farmer. 

PLEASE FILL OUT THIS FORM TO AUDITION: [[https://forms.gle/2k7PQoxBEyPNE4kWA](https://forms.gle/2k7PQoxBEyPNE4kWA)](https://forms.gle/2k7PQoxBEyPNE4kWA)

Happy self-taping!

topComments.text: Would you accept someone older that can play very young for the role of Margaret?
The mother isn’t in the link, did that role get cast?

items.text:
Casting Call - BLACK MALE - 24
Casting is now open for the role of OLDER for our upcoming short film "Hoops Edge" written and directed by Kwamé Kandekore and co-directed by Jordan Aaron.

OLDER, is a 24 year old young man full of energy and quiet love for his brother. After being away for a while he is determined to train his brother the only way he knows. He is passionate but comes across agressive and tough. 

Ideally you play or have played basketball before (if you haven’t but are willing to learn, we still want to hear from you).

We will be shooting in London in August 2026. This is an unpaid role but expenses and catering will be covered. 

Interested? Email us at onetoomanyprod@gmail.com with your name, a headshot, where you are based, a brief description, a spotlight/Mandy link (if you have one) and if you play the sport: a short video of you throwing some hoops! 

Let’s get rolling 🏀

Thank you!

items.text:
**Casting Call – London **

Casting for an upcoming rehearsed reading as part of Omnibus Theatre’s 96Fest.

1hr queer comedy play taking place on the 3rd June, 8:30pm.

**Details:**
*  Location: Central London
*  Roles: Multiple genders, open to any race
*  Pay: Profit share of all ticket sales 

Must be free all day 3rd June & prior rehearsal dates will take place during of these dates:
* Wed, 27th May
* Fri, 29th May Mon
* 1st June
* Tue, 2nd June

**If you’re interested, please send:**
* A recent headshot
* Spotlight link (if you have one)
* Any showreel or previous work (if available)

OR
* A self tape recording (script extracts linked below)
* Your availability

**Email **[ewaynforth@gmail.com](mailto:ewaynforth@gmail.com) 

Link to casting treatment & script extracts for tapes:

[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing).

Feel free to share or tag someone who might be interested!

items.title: **Casting Call – London **

items.text:
Doctor Who Fan Film Casting Call
We’re looking for four actors to fill roles for a Doctor Who Fan Film Christmas Special due to film in July/August this year.

The roles:

Eleanor - A Young woman in her mid 20s, she lives alone and has a complicated relationship with her family 

Edwin - A Victorian watchmaker in his mid 20s, and ancestor to Eleanor 

Time Reaper - Mysterious villain seeking to kill Eleanor 

Chris - Modern day character who appears in the final seven of the episode 

Filming will take place in various locations around South London/Surrey such as Cheam, Morden, Sutton and Wimbledon. Exact locations are TBC

Exact dates are TBC but will fall during the 6 week school summer holiday 

As this is a fan film project unfortunately I am unable to offer payment as we do not make money from these projects. I can however offer travel money if it is needed.

If you’re interested send me a message or send an email to dc63productions@gmail.com

topComments.text: Just wondering why your Victorian watchmaker needs to be in his mid 20’s, are you allergic to people over 30? I would have thought a watchmaker in his 50’s would be more credible (still excludes me as I am now 60 so I’m not commenting in the hope that I would be considered)
Sent email

sharedPost.text:
„Was ist Wahrheit?“

Aus dieser Frage entsteht derzeit ein außergewöhnliches neues Musiktheaterwerk:

DIE LETZTEN STUNDEN

Ein Musikdrama in sieben Bildern über Jesus, Judas, Maria Magdalena und den Zerfall von Wahrheit, Erinnerung und Wirklichkeit.

Zwischen monumentalem Chor, orchestralen Klangflächen, modernen Popstimmen, Operngesang und elektronischen Elementen entsteht eine düstere, emotionale und kompromisslose Klangwelt.

Die Musik verbindet Einflüsse großer Musikdramen mit moderner Klangsprache: von sakraler Wucht bis zu zerbrechlicher Intimität,.von Dissonanz bis zu Stille.

Im Zentrum steht nicht nur die Passion, 
sondern der Mensch:

Zweifel
Verrat
Liebe
Macht
Erinnerung

Und die Frage, wie Wahrheit entsteht.

Das Werk wird nicht nur geschrieben —
sondern vollständig eigenständig komponiert.

Der Schluss:
Hammerschläge.
Ein zerfallender Chor.
Dissonanzen 
Dunkelheit.

Und eine letzte Frage,
die im Raum bleibt:

„Was ist Wahrheit?“

#DieLetztenStunden #Musiktheater #NeueOper #Oper #Musical #Soundtrack #Orchester #Klangkunst #Judas #Jesus #MariaMagdalena #Vellin

items.text:
Liebe Caster, liebe Booker, liebe Produktionsteams, 

wenn Ihr bei kurzfristigen Besetzungen kein Blut sehen könnt, dann könnt Ihr genau dafür mich buchen. 

Ich bin Christian Weiße aus Köln, Darsteller, Komparse, Kleindarsteller, Content Creator und Filmproduzent mit viel Praxis vor und hinter der Kamera. Ich kenne Setabläufe, verstehe Disposition, Regie, Timing, Anschluss, Geduld, Wiederholungen, kurzfristige Änderungen und die Realität am Drehtag. Genau deshalb bin ich nicht nur ein weiterer Name in einer Liste, sondern eine verlässliche Lösung, wenn eine Besetzung sauber, glaubwürdig und ohne zusätzliche Reibung funktionieren muss. 

Ich bin kurzfristig verfügbar, komme aus Köln und bin je nach Projekt auch überregional organisierbar. Auf Wunsch auch gemeinsam mit Sandra Wötzel als eingespielte Duo-Option: einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Darsteller gewinnen. 

Referenzen vor der Kamera, Kurzform: 

Film / Kino: Identitti, About us / Afterglow, DIE JAHRE MIT DIR, Embrace The Switch 

TV / Serien / Streaming: Alles was zählt, Unter Uns, Soko Köln, Die Landarztpraxis, Die Füchsin, Köln 50667, Frier & 50 - Am Ende meiner Tage, Die Falle, Plötzlich Schwester, The Comeback, Tatort - Maskerade, Tatort - Die guten Leute, Mein bester Freund, seine Freundin und ich, Wäldern - Staffel 3, Husk, Merz gegen Merz, So hell die Nacht, Die Zweiflers, Doitscha, Perfekt zusammen?!, Embassy, Der Blaulicht Report, Auf Streife, Notruf 

Show / Doku / Factual / Magazin: ZDF heute Show, RTL extra - Der Kaffeereport, Das Motzmobil, Ich bin ein Star - das Nachspiel, Local Hero Bingo, Terra Xplore - Thema Trennung, Die Pumuckl Show, Grill den Henssler 

Gericht / Scripted Reality: Barbara Salesch - Das Strafgericht, Ulrich Wetzel - Das Strafgericht 

Werbung / Web / Eigenproduktion: Edle Tropfen, über 1000 eigene Image-, Event-, Doku- und Filmproduktionen 

Meine Daten in Kurzform: 

Christian Weiße 
Spielalter: 35-50 
Wohnort: Köln 
Größe: 175 cm 
Gewicht: 75 kg 
Konfektion: 48 
Schuhgröße: 41 
Augen: blau-grün 
Haare: dunkelblond, kurz 
Brille: Brillenträger, ohne Brille spielbar 
Führerschein: B, BE, AM 
Kontakt: 017661015160 
E-Mail: christian.weisse.talent@gmail.com 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/christianweissedigicontent/ 

Wenn Ihr also eine Besetzung sucht, die sichtbar passt, seterfahren arbeitet, zuverlässig erscheint und am Drehtag eher entlastet als erklärt werden muss, dann denkt gern an mich. 

Ich bin bereit, Euer Projekt mit Professionalität, Timing und Herz zu unterstützen und stimme der Datenspeicherung zu. 

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion

📸 Suche Fotografen & Videografen! Offen für alle Arten von Shootings 🎥
Hi! Ich bin auf der Suche nach Kooperationen und offen für absolut jedes Format: Foto, Video, kreative Projekte oder kommerzielle Werbedrehs.

Kurz vorab: Ich bin kein Runway-Model mit Modelmaßen. Ich bin eine ganz normale Frau mit einem natürlichen Look, aber super motiviert, mich in verschiedensten Stilen auszuprobieren и neue Looks umzusetzen.

Ich bin zeitlich extrem flexibel, fast immer verfügbar und spontan einsatzbereit. Wenn ihr ein Gesicht für euer Projekt sucht oder kurzfristig jemanden vor der Kamera braucht — schreibt mir einfach, ich bin für jeden Spaß zu haben!

📍 Location: Berlin (und Umgebung).

📩 Schreibt mir gerne eine private Nachricht, ich freue mich auf eure Ideen!

🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM 🎬
Project: The Green Frog  

Director: Khushik Mangal  

Production Company: Chronic Pictures  

Location: London / Surrey  

Shoot Dates: End of June – July 2026  

We are casting for a key role in our upcoming feature film:

Character: Lando LeDoux  

Gender: Male  

Age Range: 21–28  

Requirements:  

– Must have long hair  

– Must have a beard  

– Strong screen presence and naturalistic acting style preferred  

This is a great opportunity to be part of a bold, character-driven indie feature.

📩 To apply, please send:  

– Headshot  

– Showreel (if available)  

– Current photos (clearly showing hair length)  

– Contact details  

Email: chronicpictures22@gmail.com  

Website: chronicpictures.co.uk

items.text:
🎭 Intermittents du spectacle 

Avec Ardalos Formation, Nous proposons une formation 100% financée , idéale pour celles et ceux qui souhaitent développer leur présence scénique et leur coaching artistique.  

Au programme :  
✨ Travail de prise d’identité artistique  
✨ Coaching scénique  
✨ Prestations sur scène  
✨ 80 heures rémunérées en cachets  

Une belle opportunité pour enrichir votre expérience, travailler votre artistique et cumuler des heures.  

📩 N’hésitez pas à venir en DM pour plus d’informations.

items.text:
✨ Dancers… are you ready for MORE than just the competition stage? ✨

Step into the spotlight with Passport to Dance — where talented dancers evolve into multi-hyphenate performers in dancing, modeling, acting, and influencing. 💃🎬📸✨

This is your chance to:

⭐ Perform beyond the studio or competition scene

⭐ Build confidence & industry skills

⭐ Work toward real-world opportunities

⭐ Train like the next generation of entertainment talent

⭐ Be seen by agents, managers & casting directors looking to sign commercial dancers

If you’ve ever dreamed of taking your passion to the next level… this is YOUR moment. 🚀

The industry is looking for versatile talent — are you ready to stand out? 👏🔥  https://passporttodance.com/

#PassportToDance #DanceLife #FutureStar #DanceOpportunities #BeyondTheStage #TripleThreat #DanceIndustry #PerformerLife

items.text:
BYDGOSZCZ / okolice

PILNIE szukamy mężczyzny do roli OCHRONIARZA (security) do nowego serialu „In Cold Eyes”.

Zdjęcia: 18 maja
Stawka: 400 zł brutto za 1 dzień zdjęciowy

Szukamy wysokiego, dobrze zbudowanego, charakterystycznego mężczyzny o typowej prezencji ochroniarza.
Wzrost orientacyjnie od 180 cm.

Szukamy wyłącznie osób z Bydgoszczy lub okolic, które mogą samodzielnie dojechać na plan zdjęciowy.

Wszystkie zainteresowane osoby proszę o wiadomość prywatną wraz ze zdjęciem i wzrostem 🙂

Opdag hvorfor oregano er det naturlige middel, din krop har længtes efter.

 Opskrifter, skjulte fordele og hvordan du bruger det korrekt.

 Klik på den første kommentar, og begynd at hele hjemmefra.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'VIDSTE DU DET? Oregano Lindrer bronkitis og astma, kurerer akne og bumser, bekaemper angst og sovnloshed, forebygger hovedpine, gigt- og muskelsmerter, hjaelper pả fordojelsesbesvaer, opkastning og diarré, reducerer kolesterol, indeholder fibre, mineraler, omega-3 og vitaminer, hjaelper med at regulere forhojet blodtryk, forebygger Parkinsons og kraeft. GIV MIG EN HEJ ELLER TAK, SẢ JEG VED, AT DU LASER MED'

Hey everyone! 

I’m super proud because I recently completed my new and improved portfolio and I’d love some feedback or general advice about it! 

I’m also increasingly looking for new jobs or opportunities so I’d love some help in that department. 

If anyone has an agent, agency or someone that could be of some assistance, it’d mean a lot to me. 

Thank you all, let me know what you think down below and have a great day 😆😆

items.text: Why is everyone so serious about “being weird?”  Foolishness and a a child’s deadly serious attitude toward playing pretend is the best doorway to creativity.

attachments.ocrText: May be pop art of text
May be an image of book and text
May be an image of text that says 'Do silly things. Foolishness is a great deal more vital and healthy than our straining and striving after a meaningful life. Ine. Anton Chekhov Chekhov AZQUOTES'

items.text:
**Open Call — The New Symposium **

The New Symposium is launching new groups this weekend! It invites musicians, researchers, and artists working across music and related artistic disciplines 

—

Join one of **five ongoing groups** to take part in the** first in-person gathering at the 6th edition of Bled Contemporary Music Week in June**, where participants will exchange ideas and create together throughout the week in an open, collaborative format.

Participants form an interdisciplinary working group and develop their practice in dialogue with an international community. Weekly online exchanges, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning create a dynamic space shaped by participants’ needs, enabling artistic growth and development.

**GROUPS and their orientation: **
* Friday I – Composition & Research based
* Friday II – Production & projects development
* Saturday I – Performance & Composition, emphasis on theoretical exploration 
* Saturday II – Interdisciplinary Group, Practice as the foundation for discussions
* Sunday I – Composition & Performance 

—

Participation fee: 100€ monthly 

Apply before May 25, to join the program and festival in June

May be an image of lake
May be an image of text that says 'Teden Teden sodobne glasbe Bled / Bled Contemporary Music Music Week 19.-26. 19.-26.6.2026 26. 19. 6. 2026'

items.text:
Auditions for Around the World in 80 Days at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente
AUDITIONS!

Around the World in 80 Days
Adapted by Mark Brown. From the novel by Jules Verne.
Directed by Frank Minano

Auditions:
Sunday, May 24 @ 6:00pm

Callbacks: by invitation Tuesday, June 2 @ 7:00pm

Synopsis:
Join fearless adventurer Phileas Fogg and his faithful manservant as they race to beat the clock! Phileas Fogg has agreed to an outrageous wager that puts his fortune and his life at risk. With his resourceful servant Passepartout, Fogg sets out to circle the globe in an unheard-of 80 days. But his every step is dogged by a detective who thinks he’s a robber on the run. Danger, romance, and comic surprises abound in this whirlwind of a show as 6 actors portraying 39 characters traverse seven continents in one of the great adventures of all time.

Please be prepared to read from sides provided
Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.
Cold reading sides will also be provided at auditions.
Performances: August 21 to September 13, 2026

Thurs–Sat at 7:30pm
Sundays at 2:00pm

Saturday matinees August 29 and September 12 at 2:00pm
Rehearsals at Cabrillo Playhouse

@7pm
June 9,16, 23, 30
July 7, 9, 21, 22, 28, 29
Aug 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 13
Tech 16-20

*Final week of rehearsal call time is 6:30pm*

We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.
There is a $100 stipend offered

The play blends Victorian adventure with Monty Python–style farce. Characters are richly drawn but heightened for theatricality—committed, playful, and self-aware. Timing, transformation, and ensemble cohesion are key

All audition information can be found at: [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM**

We are casting for an upcoming short film rooted in Oakland culture, family, identity, and community. Seeking actors who can bring authenticity, emotional depth, and strong presence to the following roles. Looking to film in the Bay Area in September. Experience preferred, but not required.

If Interested, please e-mail acting resume with portfolio to [gellipascualmedia@gmail.com](mailto:gellipascualmedia@gmail.com) with the Subject Line entitled “JORDAN SHORT - CASTING SUBMISSION – [Role Name] – [Actor Name]”

**JORDAN**

**Age Range:** 19–20
**Ethnicity:** African American / Biracial
**Height:** 5’7”–6’3
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan is stylish, confident, and naturally charismatic. He carries the pride, depth, and culture of Oakland in a way that feels effortless and real. His style is intentional and expressive — cool without trying too hard. Hair can be locs, braids, or a curly fro. Jordan has quiet strength, emotional depth, and is still growing into who he is. We are looking for someone grounded, layered, and authentic.

**JOVAN**

**Age Range:** 19–23
**Ethnicity:** Filipino American
**Height:** 5’7”–6’4”
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jovan is fashionable, charismatic, and full of personality. He has a bold, unapologetic look , possibly a low fade, rat tail, or a distinct personal style that stands out. On the surface, he is funny, playful, and magnetic, but underneath is someone intelligent, observant, and mysterious. He notices more than he says and keeps people guessing.

**MARIE **

**Age Range:** 40–50
**Ethnicity:** Filipino
**Language: **Must be fluent in Tagalog
**Background:** From the Philippines

Marie is a strong, smart, and resilient Filipino woman with lived experience. She carries authority naturally and has a presence that commands respect. She is tough but loving, direct but caring. Marie is grounded, practical, emotionally intelligent, and unafraid to speak the truth.  

**GRANDPA / JOVAN’S GRANDFATHER**

**Age Range:** 60–80
**Ethnicity:** Filipino
**Language: **Must be fluent in Tagalog
**Background:** From the Philippines

Grandpa is a quiet, observant Filipino elder whose presence says more than words. He may not speak often, but when he does, it matters. Looking for someone who can bring stillness, dignity, and emotional weight to the role.

**PROFESSOR AUGUSTINE**

**Age Range:** 30–40
**Ethnicity:** Caucasian
**Height:** 6’0”–6’3”
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Professor Augustine is intelligent, grounded, and intentional. He understands Oakland, its culture, and its community. He serves as a mentor figure,supportive, but not afraid to challenge his students to think deeper and grow. We are looking for someone who can bring warmth, intellect, and a strong mentor-like presence.

**MYLO**

**Age Range:** 13
**Ethnicity:** Latino
**Height:** Short for his age

Mylo is a sharp, observant young teen with big energy. He is curious, impressionable, and figuring out who he wants to become. He looks up to the older boys and absorbs everything happening around him. There is innocence in him, but also a toughness shaped by his environment. Mylo represents youth, potential, and the crossroads between childhood and the streets.

**JORDAN’S MOTHER**

**Age Range:** Late 40s–Mid 50s
**Ethnicity:** White
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan’s mother is strong, grounded, and emotionally aware. She understands Oakland and the complexities of the world her son is navigating. She is protective, loving, and firm. While she may not always fully understand Jordan’s choices or environment, her love for him is deep. She wants him to be accountable, focused, and safe.

**JORDAN’S FATHER**

**Age Range:** 40s–50s
**Ethnicity:** African American
**Occupation:** Truck Driver
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan’s father is hardworking, disciplined, and practical. As a truck driver, he has spent years on the road providing for his family. He may not be overly expressive, but his love shows through action, sacrifice, and responsibility. He believes in structure, accountability, and hard work. We are looking for someone who can bring strength, realism, and quiet emotional depth.

items.text:
Posting for a friend! Please do not DM me, I won't likely see it.

**Casting Call - San Jose** (Student Film)

Looking for an actor for a scene/skit this week. Flexible on day but looking for someone for 1.5-2hrs between 11am and 2pm near Japantown in San Jose. Open to any ethnicity, age (18+) and experience. 

This is for a school project so unpaid but will grab you a coffee and provide the edited copy in a month or less.

About the short film:
In a city park, a man’s seemingly harmless morning routine with his squirrel-chasing dog turns into a moral reckoning when a stranger calls his attention to the visible fear of the little mammals.

Casting for:
PARKGOER - an active member of the community who prides themselves on being respectful and ethical. A believer of "see something, say something", is never afraid to be the bold one to stick out in the crowd for what's right. Grew up with pets and is an animal lover.

This is best suited for someone who is looking to collaborate, add to their reel/experience or just want to get involved in a fun, little shoot! Copy & credit

If interested, please email  zakbyrd@campjupiter.com with your reel and headshots (if available). Thank you so much!

Angela Boehm Casting is looking for a MALE DOUBLE for a Documentary that will be filming in the Cleveland, OH area likely on May 30th, 2026 (STILL TBD). 

DETAILS:
Project: Documentary
Filming Location: CLEVELAND OH Area (TBD)
Shoot Date(s): LIKELY Saturday 5.30 (TBD, will need to list conflicts around this date in your submission)
Pay Rate: $200 + 20% Agent Fee

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:
Gender: MALE
Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Age: 30s - 50s

HOW TO SUBMIT:
In order to submit for this role, please send an email to team@angelaboehmcasting.com.

SUBJECT: Documentary Double - (YOUR FULL NAME)

PLEASE INCLUDE:
- Age
- Height / Weight
- 1-2 Portrait Photo(s)
- 1-2 Full-Body Photo(s)
- Any conflicts on/around Saturday, May 30th.

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team
PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

🐈‍⬛💰Pamiętasz emocje, gdy cała Polska wstrzymywała oddech przy otwieraniu bramek? WRACAMY! Reaktywujemy kultowe show
 „IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ” i szukamy właśnie Ciebie! 📺✨#BawSięiWygrywaj 

Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:
• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡
• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡
• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!
•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:
• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.
• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ (wymagany język polski). Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

🎭 EXTRA: Im bardziej szalony strój, tym lepiej! Przebierz się za dinozaura, policjanta, albo załóż najbardziej kolorowe ciuchy, jakie masz w szafie. Zróbmy show, o którym będzie głośno! 🦖🎨

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Nie zwlekaj, miejsca w studio znikają szybciej niż nagrody z bramek!
Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL
Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ
W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

epizod niemy – granie nieboszczyka

——————————————

💰 250 zł gotówką po planie – bez własnego sprzętu

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „SUP”W treści maila napisz, czy posiadasz własną deskę z wiosłem.

——————————————

🎭 STATYŚCI

Szukamy osób w każdym wieku jako:

• policjanci i policjantki

• ratownicy medyczni

• przechodnie

• młodzież szkolna

• licealiści

💰 110 zł płatne gotówką po planie

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „GM26”

——————————————

📅 27.05 (1 dzień zdjęciowy)

🛹 DZIECI JEŻDŻĄCE NA DESKOROLKACH (6–16 lat)• epizod niemy

💰 200 zł – z własnymi deskorolkami

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „DESKOROLKA”

——————————————

🎭 STATYŚCI

Szukamy osób w każdym wieku jako:

• policjanci

• pielęgniarki i pielęgniarze

• osoby grające w szachy

• przechodnie

• dzieci bawiące się na placu zabaw

💰 110 zł płatne gotówką po planie

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „GM27”

——————————————

📩 Zgłoszenia przez formularz:https://forms.gle/abFGHnRs64zp2PT78

lub mailowo 📧 ludzie@unagimedia.pl

W treści zgłoszenia zawrzyj:

• imię i nazwisko

• wiek

• wzrost

• numer telefonu

• zdjęcie twarzy oraz sylwetk

i• rozmiar ubrań (dotyczy roli „DUBLERKA”)

❗ Pamiętaj o zatytułowaniu maila nazwą roli.

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎬

sharedPost.text:
✨ BIG NEWS FROM MAJESTIC ✨
We are so proud to officially introduce…
💜💛 Majestic Arts Collective CIC 💛💜
As many know at Majestic, we believe every child deserves the chance to shine, regardless of their background or financial circumstances.
Our mission is simple:
✨ Making performing arts accessible to all
✨ Creating opportunities for every child
✨ Supporting young people through creativity and confidence
✨ Giving back to our wider community
Did you know that around 35% of our students currently receive scholarships, bursaries, or discounted fees to help them access training with us? Supporting families and nurturing talent has always been at the heart of everything we do.
Now, through the launch of Majestic Arts Collective CIC, we can do even MORE.
As a Community Interest Company, we’ll be actively seeking sponsorships, partnerships, grants, and donations to help us continue opening doors for young people through the arts.
This is more than dance, drama, and singing.
It’s confidence. Belonging. Opportunity. Family. 💜
If you’d like to support, collaborate, sponsor, or simply learn more, we’d LOVE to hear from you.
Together, we can make performing arts accessible to all. 💜💛

#MajesticArtsCollective #PerformingArtsForAll #CommunityThroughArts #SupportYoungPeople #ArtsForAll

items.text:
Fancy doing something fun tonight? First class just £3!! 

Drop me a message to book. 👌

sharedPost.text:
Want to get involved? First Thursday class is FREE! Come and give it a try. 🙌

This was after just one class. 😊 Awesome to have some new faces along to join us in Thursday Beginners. (7-8pm)

Varied routines, regularly
Warm-up / Aerobic workout
Toning / Strengthening section
Technical work

Monday classes too. (6.30-7.30pm)

Please DM for further details and to book your slot.

#dance #beginners #GiveItaTry #fitnessclass #LiverpoolEvents

items.text:
🚨 CASTING CALL 🚨
✨ NEW LIVE KATSEYE TRIBUTE EXPERIENCE ✨

Tribute Act Entertainment are currently casting strong female commercial dancers for an exciting brand new live production inspired by KATSEYE 🌟

We’re looking for confident, high energy performers with star quality, stage presence and serious performance power ⚡️

Singing ability is a huge bonus but not essential 🎤

We’d especially love to hear from performers from a wide range of backgrounds and ethnicities as we build an authentic, diverse and visually exciting cast 💫

🔥 Summer bookings already lined up
🎭 Theatre tour later in 2026
🖤 A chance to be part of something from the very beginning

If you’re ready to “Touch” the stage and bring that ICON energy… we want to hear from you 👀✨

Register your interest now ⬇️

www.tribute-acts.com/casting

Hey everyone,

my name is Kai and I’m currently based in London.

I’ve been consistently training in acting and already have experience in front of the camera through modeling, as well as being involved in a few independent short film and creative projects.

Working on camera and being part of creative productions is something I genuinely enjoy, so I’m open to all kinds of opportunities — short films, music videos, student productions, commercials, fashion/editorial shoots and other creative projects. 🙌🏻

Languages: English & German  
Height: 178 cm  
Available for castings & self tapes

items.title: Hey everyone,

items.text:
***Casting Call - Toots***

We at Pineal Dreams Productions are deep into production on our fourth in-house film - Ouroboros - as well as working on a tangential project - Through The Doorway.

We have a pretty healthy track record of success, picking up 23 festival submissions and 15 awards through our first three works - Inside The Abyss (2022), Our Father (2024), And BARDO (2025)

We are delighted to announce we will be teaming up with T.A.F Productions and director Andy Cory for a short-film written by Joshua Moulinié (who will be acting as co-producer) - Toots.

We are casting for one actress - and this will be a dual role which we believe will give the chosen candidate a fantastic chance to develop experience, showcase their talent - as well as walk away with a fantastic showreel of footage featuring just themselves.

It also a PAID role (though quite minimal, as it is a self-funded indie project)

***Character Profile :  C/ Shadow C***

The story of Toots is a very simple one - as one person is forced to confront a manifestation of their own conscience and forced via a conversation to accept their mistakes, who they are, and come to terms with the consequences of their actions.

C is a mysterious character at first. She is deeply in denial about her own flaws, confrontational and quick to anger. As the conversation progresses, we learn more about her dual-nature and the inner conflict she has between accepting who she is and taking responsibility for her own decisions/choices - and passing the blame to the trauma that she has gone through. Despite the short being one lengthy scene, essentially, C is a very complex character with a lot of layers that get peeled away as the story progresses.

Shadow C is a combination of C’s subconscious ID (her inner truth or shadow-self) but while acting in an antagonistic way towards C - she is actually her own conscience. She is simply C’s buried regrets and self-awareness, trying to make her understand who she is, so that she can finally change, grow and move on from the past. She is a helper, not an enemy.

The ideal candidate would be:

* A young actress (20-25) looking for that break-out role that could really elevate them
* Somebody prepared to take on the challenge of an entire short (Only 16 pages, so probably 20 minutes maximum) where they are the only cast member, and it would be built entirely around them.
* Somebody who is a particularly strong character actor, capable of playing two halves of one person with convincing distinction.

Filming Details:

* Two tapes will be expected for the audition based on material sent over. One to see each version of C.
* 
* Details of filming are yet to be confirmed - but will be within the greater London region.

* Filming dates are expected to be around 2 months after casting - allowing the actress enough time to prepare properly for the role.

* The likely filming days total would be around 2 perhaps 3. (Though if extra days were needed, this can be discussed and payment adjusted accordingly)

* Filming likely to place in August and be wrapped within the same month. (Though this could change due to circumstance)

This is a PAID role (though minimal, as we are an independent studio). Transport and food of course also covered - and you can select any 3 minutes of your own choice for showreel material once the film is completed.

The film is an exploration of the inner struggle of trying to accept the difference between what happened to you - your traumas - and who you are inherently as a human being. While a simple film - taking place in only two locations - it is a relatively complex theme and asks some interesting questions about what it means to be human. What makes a person a bad person, and what is just a mistake. Who are we? Ourselves, or what happened to us?

This a film that would likely appeal to somebody with an interest in arthouse cinema.

Anybody with interest please either Email:

[Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk](mailto:Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk)

[Moulinie23@gmail.com](mailto:Moulinie23@gmail.com)

Kind Regards,

Joshua Moulinié

items.text:
Individual audition slots are filled!
DM or email 
DarkTheatreDale@proton.me 
For your information and submission pack 

🎥 Video submissions close 26 May 2026

Dark Theatre Rochdale ·  St Aidan's Church Hall ·  29–31 October 2026 

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill's 
The incendiary play presented by Dark Theatre Rochdale for the UK Amateur Premiere. 

This is Dracula as a satirical dissection — the monster is not the fangs. 
The monster is entitlement, grooming, and the casual exercise of power over other people. 

He is charming. You would like him. That is the point.

The women of this story were always the most intelligent people in the room. 

This time, they get the ending they earned.

🎭 Auditions on 30/31 May by appointment 
 

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS www.trwplays.co.uk

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #Auditions

items.text:
NEW CASTING: 

We are casting for a still shoot taking place on June 6th in south Denver. Pay is $500/person and you would be needed for approximately 3 hours. This is for a housing division and usage is in perpetuity. If you have an agent, please be sure they are ok with this before you submit. 

Adult Couple: A man and woman in their early 30s, all ethnicities. 

Family: A dad (30-40), mom (30–40), son (around 10), and daughter (around 8), all ethnicities. 

Active Adult Couple: A man and woman in their early 60s, grey haired preferred. 

If you're a fit, please send 2-3 pictures (one full body and one that clearly shows your face, no hat or sunglasses) to kari.white@comcast.net. 

Photo Credit: Kevin Steele
