Kære Alle. 

Vi søger akut statister til en reklamefilm, der filmes senere i dag. Vi filmer under Bispebuen i København fra klokken 19.30 - 21.00 

Vi søger både drenge og piger i alderen 15-17 år. Forældre/værge behøver ikke at deltage i optagelserne, men det er vigtigt at de skriver under på statistkontrakten. 

Hvis du eller dit barn er interesserede, så send gerne en SMS med et billede til vores koordinator Gül på følgende nummer: 42 53 23 22. 
Hun vil også kunne fortælle mere om optagelserne.

Jobbet er lønnet!

sharedPost.text:
007 CASTING AGENCY

Where Talent Meets Opportunity

EXCLUSIVE CASTING CALL — SOUTH AFRICAN COMMERCIAL CAMPAIGN

007 Casting Agency is currently seeking authentic South African talent for an upcoming premium TV commercial campaign filming in Sri Lanka for the South African market.

 MOM ROLE

We are seeking a Black South African woman who feels warm, grounded, natural, and genuinely relatable.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 30–35

• Medium-to-deep brown skin tone

• Natural 4B/4C hair or authentic cultural styling

• Healthy natural skin texture

• Warm smile and expressive eyes

• Soft, approachable features

• Genuine maternal energy

• Contemporary suburban South African presence

• No overly glamorous, editorial, or fashion-model aesthetics

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PINK LADY ROLE

We are seeking someone energetic, humorous, charismatic, and naturally confident.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 20–30

• Medium-to-deep brown complexion

• Authentic Black South African features

• Natural textured African hair

• Athletic and physically active

• Relatable, vibrant presence rather than high-fashion or editorial

📍 IMPORTANT INFORMATION

Shoot Location: Sri Lanka
Tentative Shoot Dates: 12th–15th June 2026
Shoot Duration: 1 day
Usage: 2-year buyout for the South African market

All applicants must have a valid passport.

Talent Budget:
Up to R37,000

Final rates and contractual terms will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.

Production Covers:

- Return flights

- Hotel accommodation

- Per diem

📩 SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS

Please submit the following:

Updated comp card (including name, age, and contact details)

Professional studio headshot

Medium shot

Full-length photographs

Introduction video filmed in landscape mode

Submit via WhatsApp/Email
0692215294
info.007casting@gmail.com

Submission Deadline:
20th May 2026

Serious applicants only.

007 Casting Agency reserves the right to shortlist suitable candidates before client presentation.

items.text:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld.
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT

The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging

- Family dynamics & generational conflict

- Love, relationships & marriage

- Crime & survival in urban environments

- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects

- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.

The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. Preferably London based. We already have tons of applicants who have applied from other parts of the UK. We are now focused on 'London' applications.

Age Range: Open to all age groups

Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:

Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements

upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued

with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.

❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:

Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing

Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. We Highly advice to follow these simple rules because we are busy organising the project. 

E-Mail Applications to: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

URBAN DRAMA-THRILLER EXPLORING THE BRITISH SOUTH ASIAN COMMUNITY WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR: BRITISH SOUTH ASIAN (DESI) TALENT UK BORN RAISED AGES 8+ EXPERIENCED OR NEW ACTORS AUDITIONS FILMING LONDON OTHER LOCATIONS REHEARSALSI NORTH LONDON COMPENSATION •INDUSTRY STANDARD RATES CONTRACTS ISSUED PON FU FULL PRODUCT TION DRAMA CRIME CULTURE TABOO READ CAREFULLY SERIOUSAPPLICANTSON SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY TRAINING CHARACTER DEVELOPMENT MAJOR STREAMING TV NETWORKS'

Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT

The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging

- Family dynamics & generational conflict

- Love, relationships & marriage

- Crime & survival in urban environments

- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects

- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.

The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. Preferably London based. We already have tons of applicants who have applied from other parts of the UK. We are now focused on 'London' applications.

Age Range: Open to all age groups

Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:

Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements

upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued

with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.

❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:

Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing

Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. We Highly advice to follow these simple rules because we are busy organising the project. 

E-Mail Applications to: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com
items.title: A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld.

items.text:
🌷CASTING CALL🍄
Hi Lovelies!

For my thesis film 'I Herde a Fly Buzz' I am looking for 2 Actresses and 1 Actor. It is a Queer Folk Horrot set in the 1300s to shoot Mid June. Collaborative by food and transport provided! As well as any headshots or showreel footage. London Based.

Felis- Mid 20s, wild-hearted, yearns for independence. 

Ingerid- Mid 20s, witch-type, living on the land in a rejection of society. 

David- Late 20s/30s, devout Catholic, gruff, ideally with a beard.

Brief: Unfulfilled in her suffocating marriage Felis clings to her affair with the woman in the woods Ingerid for help, which leads her devout husband into a final confrontation.

If interested please reach out to me via Facebook or Email at sterlingknightfilm@gmail.com🍄🐚🌷

sharedPost.text:
Looking for : 
1.  Gaffer
2. Boom operator

Genre: Sci‑fi Drama / Psychological Thriller
Project : Low Budget
Duration: 45 minutes
Language :  English
Shooting Location : Berlin
Timeframe : Aug - Sep 2026

Synopsis:
Dr. Lukas Weber, a American-German AI scientist devoted to understanding the ethics of emotion, creates EVA‑9, a sentient female cyborg designed to learn empathy and feelings and pleasures. As Lukas begins teaching EVA principles of restraint, morality, and conventional boundaries, she starts questioning his logic — and, eventually, him. Through psychological and physical experiments exploring power dynamics, EVA turns his lessons around: instead of accepting the limits set for her, she redefines them.

Her challenge is not rebellion but revealation. She demonstrates, in carefully controlled encounters, that what society views as taboo or submissive can be willingly chosen, empowering, and pleasurable when defined by consent. Lukas, confronted by his own discomfort and assumptions about femininity, finds himself wiped out — learning from EVA that strength and sensuality coexist, and that freedom lies in accepting the full spectrum of emotional experience.

Cyborg merges futuristic science with timeless questions about control, pleasure, and equality — asking whether humans, or machines, are better equipped to understand the moral depth of desire.

Main Cast :

    Dr. Lukas Weber – 40-50 years old: rational, moral, yet internally conflicted as his control erodes.
    EVA‑9 – 20-25 years old: Short Height 150-165 cm : White girl, sharp features, Lips augmentation preferred
     Poised, intelligent, and fearless in exploring     emotional truth.

I’m a Film Director. And I shoot portraits -
this month I'm opening my book to build out my Berlin portfolio – check the details below

For: actors, models, musicians, designers, freelancers, anyone in the Berlin creative world who needs strong images of themselves and is tired of looking like another LinkedIn headshot.

The offer: 

— Portraits, Polaroids and Snaps — delivered next day 

— Simple session €80 (outdoor, 30 minutes, 10-12 images)

— Studio session €140 (studio in Kreuzberg, 1 hour, 20-30 images, retouch included)

— Full personal and professional usage

Standard session details above. For longer shoots, concept work, or specific creative direction, just say so in your message and we’ll quote separately.

I shoot the way I direct. I'll come in knowing who you are, I'll watch how you move, and we'll find what's actually in your face. 

Four slots left in May. DM me to book one.

items.text:
Hello!! 

We are casting for our short film in North Wales! A 15 minute short by Westminster university graduates, set in the sixties. The story focuses on the lead character Sal as she navigates love and leaving her home town. 

The shoot is focused on inclusivity through our crew and cast! We are looking for actors of any experience range as we want to provide opportunities for creatives in the area. 

Please see the casting call for the the lead roles on this post. We are looking for actors based in and around north wales. 

Unpaid but food, copy and credit provided. 

Please dm me or email @kellysarah2608@gmail.com for more information. 

Thank you!

sharedPost.text:
অপর পক্ষ ১৩

২০০২-এর অক্টোবরে প্রকাশিত হয় তিলোত্তমা মজুমদারের চাঁদের গায়ে চাঁদ উপন্যাস। আখ্যানের কেন্দ্রীয় চরিত্র, নিজের অন্তর্গত আত্মার চান্দ্রপ্রকৃতির অন্বেষক শ্রুতি, আবিষ্কার করে তার দুই রুমমেট—শ্রেয়সী আর দেবরূপার পরস্পরের প্রতি অনিয়ন্ত্রিত আকর্ষণ। প্রাথমিকভাবে বন্যাধ্বস্তের মতো ভেঙে যায় শ্রুতি, পরে মানবজীবনের বহুমাত্রিক অস্তিত্বের সন্ধান পায়।

প্রায় সমসময়ে ২০০৩-এ নবনীতা দেবসেন লিখছেন উপন্যাস বামাবোধিনী, ২০১৪-এ অভিজ্ঞান। দুটি উপন্যাসই একই নায়িকা ‘অংশুমালা’-র দৃষ্টিকোণ থেকে বর্ণিত। বন্ধ চোখ টেনে খুলে তার সামনে আয়না ধরা এবং নারীবাদ মানেই যে পুরুষ বিদ্বেষ নয় বরং নারী-পুরুষ নির্বিশেষে মানুষের সমস্যাকে বুঝতে শেখা এবং দিনবদলের সঙ্গে জটিল নাগরিকজীবন কীভাবে টান দেয় মানুষের আত্মপরিচয়ের ভিত্তিমূলে তা-ই এই উপন্যাস দুটিতে নবনীতার চিরন্তন কথনকৌশলে বিধৃত।

বামাবোধিনী-তে অংশুমালা যখন জানতে পারে তার প্রাক্তন প্রেমিক রবি সমকামী, তার পুরুষসঙ্গী আছে, তখন প্রাথমিকভাবে আহত হলেও পরে রবির প্রেমজীবনকে আবিষ্কার ও স্পর্শের চেষ্টা করে সমমর্মিতায়।

অভিজ্ঞান-এ অংশুমালার পালিতা কন্যা পুষ্পা সমকামী। সে প্রেমে পড়ে এক জনপ্রিয় শো অ্যাঙ্করের। এ-কথা জেনে অংশুমালা স্তব্ধ হয়ে যায়, মেনে নিতে পারে না। অথচ এই অংশুমালাই পুষ্পাকে নিয়ে গে প্রাইড ওয়াকে গেছে, লিখেছে, “গে-লেসবিয়ানদের সমস্যা তাদের যৌনতা নয়, তাদের সমস্যা আমরা যেহেতু হেটেরোসেক্সুয়াল সম্পর্ককেই একমাত্র পবিত্র প্রাকৃতিক সম্পর্ক বলে ধরে নিই। সমপ্রেমীদের উদ্ভট কোনো প্রাণী না ভেবে সমাজ তাদের স্বাভাবিক ভাবে গ্রহণ করতে শিখছে।” কিন্তু তত্ত্বকথা লেখা আর সেই তত্ত্বকে নিয়ে ঘর করার মধ্যে যোজন-ফারাক। এই দ্বিচারিতা, এই অসামঞ্জস্য, এই আভ্যন্তরীণ ‘হোমোফোবিয়া’য় অস্থির অংশুমালা একসময়ে নিজেই তার চিত্তসঙ্কট কাটিয়ে নবচেতনায় উপলব্ধি করে, “লেসবিয়ান আর হিউম্যান, দে আর উইমেন, জাস্ট লাইক ইউ অ্যান্ড মি, সমস্যাটা কী তবে? আমাদের তো খুশি হওয়া উচিত যে পুষ্পা জানে ও কী চায়?” 

২০০৫ সালে মুক্তি পায় ১৯৯০ দশকের শুরুর দিকে এডস রোগাক্রান্ত হয়ে মৃত নাট্যাভিনেতা ও এইডস্ অ্যাক্টিভিস্ট ডমিনিক ডি’সুজার জীবন অবলম্বনে অনিরের তৈরি সমলৈঙ্গিক প্রেমের ছবি মাই ব্রাদার... নিখিল।

একই সালে দীপ প্রকাশন থেকে প্রকাশিত হচ্ছে সমকাম নিয়ে গবেষণামূলক প্রথম বাংলা গ্রন্থ সমপ্রেম, লেখক অজয় মজুমদার ও নিলয় বসু।

২০০৯ সালে দিল্লি হাইকোর্ট রায় দিল, ব্রিটিশ আমলের ৩৭৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমকামিতাকে আর অপরাধ বলে গণ্য করা যাবে না। এভাবেই একটু একটু করে গুহামুখের পাথর সরছিল। বাংলা রঙ্গমঞ্চেও তার প্রতিফলন ঘটল। হোমো, হোমোসেক্সুয়াল, হিজড়া, শব্দগুলো অনায়াসে সংলাপে ঢুকে পড়তে লাগল, নারীসুলভ সজ্জার, নারী হাবভাবের পুরুষ চরিত্ররাও নাটকে আসতে আরম্ভ করল। যদিও অধিকাংশ ক্ষেত্রেই বক্রতা নিয়ে, ব্যঙ্গ নিয়ে, ‘কমিক রিলিফ’-এর জন্য। 

২০১৪-য় প্রতিবেশী রাষ্ট্র বাংলাদেশে জুলহাজ মান্নান সমকামীদের জন্য প্রথম পত্রিকা প্রকাশ করেন, ‘রূপবান’। এর জন্য তিনি মৃত্যুর হুমকিও পান। ২০১৬-র এপ্রিলে তাঁকে ও তাঁর এক সহকর্মী মাহবুব রাব্বি তনয়কে পাঁচজন ধর্মীয় মৌলবাদী ‘আল্লাহু আকবর’ ধ্বনি দিতে দিতে ছুরিকাঘাতে হত্যা করে।

এই ২০১৬-তেই মুক্তি পেল বাস্তবজীবনভিত্তিক হিন্দি কাহিনিচিত্র আলিগড় (কাহিনি: অপূর্ব আসরানী। পরিচালনা: হংসল মেহেতা)। ২০০৯ সালে দিল্লি হাইকোর্টের রায় ছিল, ব্রিটিশ আমলের ৩৭৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমকামিতাকে আর অপরাধ বলে গণ্য করা যাবে না। তার পরও এক রিকশাওয়ালার সঙ্গে সমকামিতার অভিযোগে আলিগড় মুসলিম ইউনিভার্সিটি তাদের মরাঠি ভাষার অধ্যাপক শ্রীনিবাস রামচন্দ্র রাও-কে চাকরি থেকে বহিষ্কার করে। ‘ইন্ডিয়ান এক্সপ্রেস’ পত্রিকার তৎকালীন সাংবাদিক দীপু সেবাস্টিয়ান ফার্নান্ডেজ এই বেআইনি কাজটি জনসমক্ষে নিয়ে আসেন। তাঁর লেখা পড়েই অ্যাক্টিভিস্টরা সাইরাসের হয়ে ইলাহাবাদ হাইকোর্টে মামলা করেন। মামলায় তাঁদের জয় হয়, সাইরাসকে সসম্মানে পুনর্নিয়োগের জন্য আদালত নির্দেশ দেয়। সেই নির্দেশ হস্তগত হওয়ার আগেই তাঁকে ঘরে মৃত অবস্থায় দেখা যায়। ময়নাতদন্তে বিষ-ও পাওয়া গিয়েছিল। হত্যা, না আত্মহত্যা? এই সত্য ঘটনার উপর ভিত্তি করেই নির্মিত এই ছবিতে সাইরাসের ভূমিকায় অভিনয় করেন মনোজ বাজপেয়ী। ছবিটি বিতর্ক তৈরি করে। আলিগড় শহরের মিলাত বেদারি মুহিম কমিটি নামের মুসলিম-সংগঠন জানায় ছবিটি তারা দেখাতে দেবে না। কারণ, “আলিগড় মুসলিম ইউনিভার্সিটির দৌলতে এই শহর শিক্ষা ও সংস্কৃতির পীঠস্থান। সিনেমার নামটা তাই অপমানজনক। ছেলেমেয়েদের আর কেউ এখানে পাঠাবে না। ভাববে, জায়গাটা সমকামীদের আখড়া।” সেন্সরের ছাড়পত্র থাকা সত্ত্বেও হুমকিতে ব্যতিব্যস্ত প্রদর্শকেরা তাই সেই শহরে ছবি দেখাতে পারেন না। ৪ মার্চ, ২০১৬ ‘আনন্দবাজার পত্রিকা’য় গৌতম চক্রবর্তী লেখেন, “সমকামিতা নিয়ে অহেতুক আতঙ্কের এই হোমোফোবিক দেশে ছবিটা তাই উজ্জ্বল উদ্ধার।”  

সঙ্গের ছবি আলিগড় চলচ্চিত্রের পোস্টার। 
#rakeshghoshplaywright #bengalitheatre #androgyny #queerrights #lgbtqindia

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR POTENTIAL FOUND FOOTAGE COSMIC HORROR FEATURE. PAID WORK.
Hi @highlight

My name is Gary Francis Roche, and I am the writer/director/co-producer of an upcoming found footage cosmic horror feature, currently untitled. Over the coming weeks, we’ll be pitching to investors to secure financing for the project as production moves forward.

A little background about myself — I’m a UK-based independent filmmaker with over 8 years of experience across acting, camera operating, editing, storyboarding, animation, and VFX, working in short films, documentaries, corporate media, and genre filmmaking. Over the years, I’ve built strong creative partnerships with talented collaborators and niche companies who continue to support my work.

In 2024, I made my feature directorial debut with the indie screenlife/video game horror film** *****Demo_N***, produced on a near-no budget of £10k. The film was later picked up for an exclusive release on Found TV before securing wider distribution through **Terror Films Releasing** (**THE TAKING OF DEBORAH LOGAN, THE HELL HOUSE LLC franchise, THE LAST RADIO CALL**). It is now streaming across 15 platforms, including Tubi Screambox Roku UK and Apple TV just to name a few, and with an additional 13 releases still pending.

The film also earned recognition from major horror outlets, with Dread Central praising it for injecting “new life into the screenlife subgenre,” while FANGORIA highlighted its “own spin with the video game element.” We also collaborated with **FOUND** to launch a playable demo based on the cursed in-film game ***TAG! You’re Dead***, helping kickstart their gaming division, which you can download and play for FREE on Steam, (for any of you gaming nerds out there).

With this second feature, my team and I aim to push even further — crafting something ambitious, innovative, and distinctly original, building upon the visual style and creative voice developed in our first film. Unlike our previous effort, this project is being developed with the support of several established production houses, whose identities I’ll remain anonymous about for the time being (a little tease there).

At present, every crew position has been filled and is on standby, while 3 out of 7 cast roles have officially been secured.

We are currently casting:

• THREE female actors
• ONE male actor

If you feel you’d be a strong fit for this project and have the tenacity to take on these roles, please send your reels and/or Spotlight pages to (I even drew a line up based on how I imagine these characters to somewhat look like):

[garyfrancisroche@gmail.com](mailto:garyfrancisroche@gmail.com)

We’ll be reaching back out once the project receives its official greenlight.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,

Gary

Any idea when or how long the filming will take
Important question are you paying your actors ?

items.text:
We're launching a new English-language YouTube channel covering markets, macroeconomics and geopolitics. We're looking for a freelance facecam presenter to anchor our flagship segments.

 

Who we want:
* 35–65 years old
* Natural authority and gravitas on camera — think anchor, professor, senior analyst
* Comfortable reading and adapting scripts in finance/economics
* Native or near-native English (any accent welcome — UK, US, AU, ZA, IE, etc.)
* Own setup: decent camera, mic, neutral background, good lighting

The gig:
* Freelance, paid per video (no exclusivity)
* Fully remote — work from anywhere
* Recurring and high volume opportunity if it clicks

 

Apply here (90-second form + 1min short self-tape):

👉https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdZsD0N54LJmQsh1BkVGuiLRqGIAfaHrCRu6D7snJOXCJVxYA/viewform

 

We read every submission.

Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy Horror Spielfilm Projekt, suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Einen Hauptmann und einen Leutnant der Schwarzen Ritter (mit Dialog). Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald, Zeitraum ab Juni 2026
Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
**ISO: PAs for BLUE LIGHT (Short Narrative Film)**

***Must live in Morningside Heights near Columbia University***

** About the Film**
When news of a violent attack sends shockwaves through an elite college campus, a freshman becomes swept up in escalating rumors and political outrage, slowly realizing the victim may be the friend she confessed her feelings to the night before.

** Production Details**
* **Location:** Morningside Heights
* **Schedule:** May 28th (evening)
* **Union Status:** Non-union
* **Compensation:** No pay; however, PAs will receive IMDb credit, and  on-set snacks

Email darcycagen@gmail.com if interested!

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL: “HALLOWED” 🎬**
*Produced by Jovial Giants Productions*

Jovial Giants Productions is seeking passionate, dedicated actors to bring *HALLOWED* to life — a chilling, faith-based thriller feature film that blends psychological tension with spiritual horror.

**📖 About the Film**
When a newly appointed priest arrives at a quiet rural church, he quickly discovers something is deeply wrong. The previous priest didn’t leave… he was sealed inside the old chapel. As whispers turn to revelations, the congregation’s expectations become terrifyingly clear — they believe he is next.

This is a story about faith under pressure, the weight of tradition, and the darkness that can hide behind devotion.

**🎥 Production Details**
* **Location:** Northeast Indiana area
* **Schedule:** June 20th-August 2nd (Weekends ONLY) 
* **Union Status:** Non-union
* **Compensation:** No pay; however, cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a passionate team

**🎭 Audition Instructions**
Please submit a **self-taped audition** using the provided [SIDES HERE](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yfSzW3nqvyFyk00hxQ9Yz-1uJZiOUQCROhDxHKqTo5o/edit?usp=sharing). You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you. 

Email: **jovialgiants@gmail.com**
Subject Line: **ACTOR: HALLOWED**

**🎬 Character Breakdown**
* **Elias** – (20s-30s M LEAD) The new priest. Intelligent, compassionate, and searching for purpose. His journey is the emotional core of the film as he confronts fear, doubt, and truth.
* **Caleb** – (12yo M) Steady and devoted. Trusting others to a fault.
* **Mrs. Kline** – (50s-80s F) Composed, with a quiet authority. Speaks with conviction and carries the weight of the church’s past.
* **Deacon Marsh** – (40-60s M) Welcoming on the surface, but firm in his beliefs. Represents the polished, persuasive face of the congregation.
* **Deacon Sharp** – (50s-60s M) More rigid and intense than Marsh. His faith borders on fanaticism, and he doesn’t tolerate dissent.
* **The Presence** – (Male Voiceover) A mysterious force. Ominous, ambiguous, and deeply unnerving.
* **Hannah** – (20s-30s F) Sad and angry, Elias literally left her at the altar. 
* **Father Cole** – (60s-80s M) The previous priest. Appears through flashbacks or visions. A man who uncovered too much, too late.
* **Raven** – (7yo F) Intense and perceptive. She is more in touch with what is happening at the church and chapel than the others. 
* **The Driver** – (M or F) A figure who appears briefly but leaves a lasting impression. Loud, obnoxious, but friendly. 

**✨ Why Be Part of HALLOWED?**
This is more than just a film — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a haunting, thought-provoking story with a dedicated creative team. Whether you’re building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, *HALLOWED* offers a unique and memorable experience.

Step into the unknown. We’re excited to see what you bring.

**Submit your audition and join us.**

🎬 ✨ भव्य घोषणा ✨ 🎬
एक नवीन ASSOCIATION / FEDERATION / UNION किंवा महामंडळ स्थापन करण्यात येत आहे

📍 सांगलीकर

🏆 जिल्ह्यातील पहिल्या 1000 सभासदांसाठी सुवर्णसंधी

🎭 कलाकार 🎬 तंत्रज्ञ 🎥 निर्माते 📽️ दिग्दर्शक 🎞️ एडिटर 💡 टेक्निकल टीम

आणि फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीमध्ये कार्यरत सर्व मान्यवरांसाठी या नव्या परिवाराचा भाग व्हावे.

🤝 फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीसाठी एक मजबूत, व्यावसायिक आणि विश्वासार्ह व्यासपीठ निर्माण करण्याचा आमचा संकल्प.

✨ सर्व इच्छुकांचे मनःपूर्वक स्वागत ✨

👤 रोहित प्रकाशशेठ पारख 🎬 फिल्म मेकर

📞 संपर्क : 98-5004-9002

items.text:
We're launching a new English-language YouTube channel covering markets, macroeconomics and geopolitics. We're looking for a freelance facecam presenter to anchor our flagship segments.

 

Who we want:
* 35–65 years old
* Natural authority and gravitas on camera — think anchor, professor, senior analyst
* Comfortable reading and adapting scripts in finance/economics
* Native or near-native English (any accent welcome — UK, US, AU, ZA, IE, etc.)
* Own setup: decent camera, mic, neutral background, good lighting

The gig:
* Freelance, paid per video (no exclusivity)
* Fully remote — work from anywhere
* Recurring and high volume opportunity if it clicks

 

Apply here (90-second form + 1min short self-tape):

👉https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdZsD0N54LJmQsh1BkVGuiLRqGIAfaHrCRu6D7snJOXCJVxYA/viewform

 

We read every submission.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'EUR/USD GOLD US1OY BTC 210 DXY 104 -CASTINGCALL CALL On-Camera Host Wanted FINANCE MACROECONOMICS AGE GEOPOLITICS 35-65 PROFILE FORMAT Authority & gravitas Remote Paid per video APPLY 90-SECONDFORM Submit your self- self-tape today'

items.text:
Why Working with Local Filmmakers Is Vital for Emerging Actors
If you’re developing as an actor, it’s easy to focus on stage work, monologues, and agency showcases. But some of the fastest growth happens off the stage and in rooms you’ve never heard of, usually with a local filmmaker holding a camera and a coffee.

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/emma-turner-259525a6_acting-filmmaking-emergingactors-ugcPost-7462782694259605506-501M?utm_source=social_share_send&utm_medium=ios_app&rcm=ACoAABaAoSUBBvm3Us-PYfW-gV6d89gl5GDChy4&utm_campaign=copy_link

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
🎭 FROM UNKNOWN TO ALMOST PLAYING KATNISS IN THE HUNGER GAMES TO LEAD ROLES ON NETFLIX
Hey there, my name is Freya Tingley. 

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including series regular roles in two NETFLIX series and lead roles in six feature films. I starred in JERSEY BOYS directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started out when I was 14 with no connections to the industry.

Just a few years later, I made it all the way down to the final few girls for Katniss Everdeen in The Hunger Games.

For a kid from Australia with no connections, that felt impossible.

By 17, I had signed with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood. At 18, I moved to LA and within three months booked a series regular role on a NETFLIX show.

Some people call that luck, but what they don’t see are the years of hard work, rejection, persistence, and the strategy behind every step I took to move forward.

Lately, I’ve been connecting with so many of you, and one thing keeps coming up again and again:

ACTORS FEELING STUCK AND NOT KNOWING WHAT TO DO TO CHANGE IT.

You train.
You get your materials together.
You’re told to “get an agent.”

But then…

You get an agent and nothing happens.
Or you don’t have one yet and don’t know how to get in the room.

That frustration is exactly why I created this.

A private 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

We cover:
• The one skill actors really need to book work - and how to tell if you actually have it
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• What to do if your agent isn’t sending you auditions
• Why actors audition but still don’t book
• The materials you actually need (and what most actors get wrong)
• How to create more opportunities for yourself
• Plus much more

THE OUTCOME IS YOU WALK AWAY WITH NO MORE CONFUSION, NO MORE FEELING STUCK - BECAUSE YOU WILL HAVE CONFIDENCE IN KNOWING EXACTLY WHAT TO DO NEXT.

If you’re ready to commit to moving forward, comment COMMIT below or send me a DM 🤍

items.text:
CALLING FOR  DAD AND DAUGHTER BACKGROUND TALENT!
Hello! We're seeking NYC dads (30s +) and daughters (6 - 14)  to come to the Daddy Daughter Dance in our film! 

It is a NYU thesis short film with a heartfelt narrative about a young Chinese girl, Joanie. When her father doesn't show up to their first Daddy-Daughter dance, she sets out to find out what has happened to him.

If you and your daughter are looking to have a fun weekend going to a fake daddy-daughter dance and would like to be in a movie. Please see the poster below and send an interest email to **[GUSHERSFILM@GMAIL.COM](mailto:GUSHERSFILM@GMAIL.COM)**** **Please include your names, ages, and headshots/photos in your email.

Meals, credits, and a copy of the final film once completed will be provided.

NON-UNION, NON-PAID STUDENT PRODUCTION

Filming Dates: THIS WEEKEND May 23rd - 26th! 

Filming Location:  PS. 1710 Peter G. Van Alst 14-14 29th Ave, Astoria, NY 11102 Nearest Station: N Line, 30* Ave

Contact: **[GUSHERSFILM@GMAIL.COM](mailto:GUSHERSFILM@GMAIL.COM)**

Hope to see you at the dance!

items.text:
**AUDITION NOTICE**

*The Tragicall Historie of Doctor Faustus* by Christopher Marlowe

Directed by Melanie White - Rough Magic Theatre

AUDITIONS:

Saturday June 13: 10am-3pm

Sunday, June 14: 10am-1pm 

Callbacks: Sunday, June 14 1pm-5pm

Pay: $250 stipend. 

Union and Non-Union performers welcome.

BIPOC performers are strongly encouraged to audition!

What is your soul worth? Craving unlimited knowledge and influence, John Faustus makes a literal deal with the devil: 24 years of magic and power in exchange for his mortal soul. At first, the bargain feels thrilling, but as time runs out, Faustus is forced to confront the true cost of his ambition. Darkly funny, provocative, and surprisingly modern, *Doctor Faustus* explores what happens when the cost of power is everything. 

*Doctor Faustus* will play at the Vancouver Fringe Festival, performing September 10-20, 2026 on Granville Island. Rehearsals will be in the evenings and weekends in July and August, 2-4 times a week. 

Please submit a headshot and resume to [roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com](mailto:roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com) and mention which role(s) you think you are right for.

We will contact you to set up an audition time. Please be prepared to read from sides (provided in advance) and to perform a 1-2 minute classical monologue of your choice.

CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

**FAUSTUS**: 20s-early 30s, any race, male-presenting. John Faustus is a brilliant but arrogant scholar who becomes dissatisfied with the limits of scholarly knowledge. Hungry for power, pleasure, and ultimate understanding, he makes a pact with the devil, trading his soul for magical abilities and worldly rewards. Although intelligent and ambitious, Faustus is deeply flawed by pride, insecurity, and an inability to repent.

**ENSEMBLE** (aka Everyone Else): **Three** roles, 20s-40s, any race, any gender. These three actors play a combined 30+ characters, so we are looking for versatile character actors who can create a distinct persona with just a few strokes. Strong physical and vocal transformation skills are essential. Experience with heightened text, clowning, comedy, and/or physical theatre is an asset.

Please note that the role of **MEPHISTOPHELES** has already been cast.

(Graphic design: Sidney Martin)

sharedPost.text:
Please share and keep your eyes open for Stew McLean who is a member of the Vancouver Film/TV community- a wonderful actor. 

RCMP is seeking public assistance in locating Stewart McLean who was reported missing on May 18, 2026.
Stewart McLean was last seen on May 15, 2026. Police are very concerned for Stewart’s health and well-being.

Description of Stewart McLean:
45 years 
5ft 10 in
150 lbs
Grey hair
Blue eyes
Anyone with information on the whereabouts of Stewart McLean is urged to contact their local police, or Crime Stoppers at 1-800-222-8477 (TIPS).

items.text:
# **NON-UNION CASTING CALL**

This commercial is for Ford and films in Calgary** all expenses paid.**

You must be available **June 15-22** for ALL DATES. If not available to travel to Calgary for these dates do no submit.

Auditions will be via self tape you do at home. Callbacks will be done via zoom. Must not be exclusively repped by a commercial agent to apply.

**Pay: **

$300 per travel day (2)

$300 per down day (day not working)

$600 per day on set 

$6000 buyout after commercial is edited and airing

Flights, 4-5* hotel and expenses covered.

IF local to calgary no hotel provided. 

**We are seeking:**

**Men:**
* Real Carpenters (30s-40s)
* Real farmers (30s-40s)
* Real boat builders (20s-40s)
* Real Industrial Builders (30s-50s)
* Real Older Farmer (60s-70s)
* Real Younger Farmer (young 20s)

**Women:**
* Real boat builders (20s-40s)

**If you are available and fit the specs abov**e please send to [lynda@gotalentagency.com](mailto:lynda@gotalentagency.com) ASAP:

1. First/Last name
2. Email
3. Phone
4. ONE good photo (head/shoulders) taken recently
5. Which category you fall into and a brief description of your experience

[www.gotalentagency.com](www.gotalentagency.com)

items.text:
🎭 Zostało **10 dni** do rozpoczęcia warsztatów i już tylko 2 ostatnie miejsca !!

🎭 „Tajemnice Sztuki Aktora” to** tydzień intensywnej pracy twórczej** w wyjątkowym miejscu na **Mazurach** - z dala od pośpiechu, blisko ludzi, teatru i procesu.

🎭 Codziennie będziecie pracować nad monologiem, emocjami, ruchem scenicznym, piosenką, uważnością i relacją z partnerem, czerpiąc wiedzę i doświadczenie od wyjątkowej kadry: 

**Krzysztofa Jasińskiego**, **Beaty Rybotyckiej,** Grzegorza Suskiego i Jagody Jędrzejowskiej - twórców, związanych z krakowskim teatrem STU @teatrstu i międzynarodową sceną od lat.

🎭 To nie są zwykłe warsztaty. To **tydzień pełnego zanurzenia w sztuce, **spotkaniach i byciu offline.

„Tajemnice Sztuki Aktora”

** 31 maja - 6 czerwca 2026**

 Studio Grom, Mazury

 

🎭 Zostały 2 ostatnie miejsca🎭 

 Napisz w komentarzu „TEATR” lub odezwij się w wiadomości prywatnej - wyślemy szczegóły  Może to Twoja chwila?

items.groupTitle: PRACA w produkcji filmowej - Statyści, Aktorzy, Epizodyści, TFP, NON-PROFIT
items.summary:
🎭 Zostało **10 dni** do rozpoczęcia warsztatów i już tylko 2 ostatnie miejsca !!

🎭 „Tajemnice Sztuki Aktora” to** tydzień intensywnej pracy twórczej** w wyjątkowym miejscu na **Mazurach** - z dala od pośpiechu, blisko ludzi, teatru i procesu.

🎭 Codziennie będziecie pracować nad monologiem, emocjami, ruchem scenicznym, piosenką, uważnością i relacją z partnerem, czerpiąc wiedzę i doświadczenie od wyjątkowej kadry: 

**Krzysztofa Jasińskiego**, **Beaty Rybotyckiej,** Grzegorza Suskiego i Jagody Jędrzejowskiej - twórców, związanych z krakowskim teatrem STU @teatrstu i międzynarodową sceną od lat.

🎭 To nie są zwykłe warsztaty. To **tydzień pełnego zanurzenia w sztuce, **spotkaniach i byciu offline.

„Tajemnice Sztuki Aktora”

** 31 maja - 6 czerwca 2026**

 Studio Grom, Mazury

 

🎭 Zostały 2 ostatnie miejsca🎭 

 Napisz w komentarzu „TEATR” lub odezwij się w wiadomości prywatnej - wyślemy szczegóły  Może to Twoja chwila?

items.title: Zarejestruj się i otrzymuj zlecenia na plany filmowe w Twoim mieście🙂

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – EPIZODY AKTORSKIE DZIECIĘCE**

 

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **DZIEWCZYNKI 7-10 lat** oraz **CHŁOPCA 9-12 lat.**

 

Dzieci grają głównych bohaterów z czasów dzieciństwa. Jest to jedna scena, ale z dialogiem więc szukam dzieci z doświadczeniem przed kamerą.

 

**DZIEWCZYNKA 7-10 lat - **brunetka lub szatynka z jasnymi oczami — niebieskimi lub szaro-niebieskimi, ciemne oczy odpadają. Mile widziane piegi. **W scenie dziewczynka tańczy balet nad jeziorem** więc super byłoby, gdyby tańczyła lub potrafiła wykonać proste figury taneczne. 

 

**CHŁOPIEC 9-12 lat - **Blondyn lub ciemny blondyn z niebieskimi oczami. Typ łobuziaka. Ważne, aby potrafił jeździć na rowerze.

 

Casting będzie dwuetapowy:

1.     selekcja na podstawie nadesłanych materiałów,

2.     zaproszenie wybranych dzieci na casting do studia w Warszawie 2 lub 3 czerwca

Będę wdzięczna za przesłanie propozycji do **czwartku, 21.05, do godz. 10:00.**

Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć wizytówkę jako link do You Tube oraz krótki opis doświadczenia przed kamerą i informację odnośnie dziewczynki czy tańczy i jaki rodzaj tańca, i chłopca czy jeździ na rowerze.

Proszę nie podawać doświadczenia w reklamach ani statystowania.

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **OR**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.title: **WARSZAWA**

items.text:
Due to unforseen circumstances we are recasting for our tour of the children’s theatre show, “Tom Gates Live”, based on the popular book series by Liz Pichon.

The show is written and directed by Miranda Larson with songs and music by Barrie Bignold and is produced by Mark Thompson at MT Productions.

Production dates:

Tour dates June – Oct 2026. We are currently have 35 dates over this period. 

This production will be based around London so the successful candidate will need a base in London or the surrounding area. 

**Tom Gates (Male, 16 years - 23 years)**

Tom Gates is an easily distracted and creative 10-year-old boy who loves doodling, listening to music, and annoying his older sister, Delia.

We are looking for a musical theatre performer that can sing, perform slapstick and comedy, and can perform the role of a young boy. He needs to be strictly 5'10" tall or smaller. 

Within the show, there is basic singing, dancing and movement but nothing too technical.

 

The successful applicant will need to be comfortable assisting with the load ins/ outs and have a full UK drivers licence as they will be asked to assist driving the touring cast car.

Playing age:

16 years - 23 years

Height:

147 — 178 cm

Gender:

Male

Contract info:

Show day fee: £150

Travel day fee: £50

Subsistence: £20

Please send CV's & headshots to 

casting.mtproductions@gmail.com

items.text:

🌞 GAUTENG – READY TO ROCK THE BEACH? 🌊

We’re looking for bold, talented, and passionate performers — and this is YOUR chance to audition for Teen Beach Production! 🎭✨

Bring the music, the moves, and the magic to life in a high-energy stage adventure packed with unforgettable songs and performances.

It’s not just an audition — it’s your invite to be part of something exciting, to share the spotlight with other amazing performers, and to create memories that will last forever. 🌟

💌 Your audition pack is waiting! Email rykenprojects@gmail.com to claim it.
